Major milestones in the AI revolution, annotated with a builder-investor lens.

AI 革命的重要里程碑，以建造者与投资者的视角标注。

Funding融资 Mar 24

Startup Gimlet Labs is solving the AI inference bottleneck in a surprisingly elegant wayGimlet Labs 用优雅方案解决 AI 推理瓶颈，融资 8000 万美元

Gimlet Labs just raised an $80 million Series A for tech that lets AI run across NVIDIA, AMD, Intel, ARM, Cerebras and d-Matrix chips, simultaneously.



Gimlet Labs 完成 8000 万美元 A 轮融资，其技术能让 AI 推理同时跨 NVIDIA、AMD、Intel、ARM、Cerebras 和 d-Matrix 芯片运行，打破单一硬件供应商锁定。
Gimlet Labs just raised an $80 million Series A for tech that lets AI run across NVIDIA, AMD, Intel, ARM, Cerebras and d-Matrix chips, simultaneously.



Gimlet Labs 完成 8000 万美元 A 轮融资，其技术能让 AI 推理同时跨 NVIDIA、AMD、Intel、ARM、Cerebras 和 d-Matrix 芯片运行，打破单一硬件供应商锁定。
Source: Techcrunch ↗来源: Techcrunch ↗
Funding融资 Mar 23

Amazon Opens Trainium Lab to Press as AWS Deepens AI Chip Push with Anthropic, OpenAI, Apple亚马逊公开 Trainium 芯片实验室，AWS AI 芯片战略全面提速

Shortly after Amazon announced its $50 billion investment in OpenAI, AWS invited TechCrunch on a private tour of the Trainium chip lab at the heart of the deal. Trainium is Amazon's custom AI training chip, and it has won over major AI labs including Anthropic, OpenAI, and Apple as a cost-effective alternative to NVIDIA hardware.



亚马逊宣布向 OpenAI 投资 500 亿美元后，AWS 邀请 TechCrunch 对 Trainium 芯片实验室进行了独家参观。Trainium 是亚马逊自研 AI 训练芯片，已赢得 Anthropic、OpenAI、Apple 等顶级 AI 机构的采用，被视为英伟达硬件的成本效益替代方案。
Shortly after Amazon announced its $50 billion investment in OpenAI, AWS invited TechCrunch on a private tour of the Trainium chip lab at the heart of the deal. Trainium is Amazon's custom AI training chip, and it has won over major AI labs including Anthropic, OpenAI, and Apple as a cost-effective alternative to NVIDIA hardware.



亚马逊宣布向 OpenAI 投资 500 亿美元后，AWS 邀请 TechCrunch 对 Trainium 芯片实验室进行了独家参观。Trainium 是亚马逊自研 AI 训练芯片，已赢得 Anthropic、OpenAI、Apple 等顶级 AI 机构的采用，被视为英伟达硬件的成本效益替代方案。
Source: TechCrunch ↗来源: TechCrunch ↗
Funding融资 Mar 21

Jeff Bezos launches $100B fund to acquire and AI-transform manufacturing firms贝索斯发起千亿美元基金，用AI改造传统制造业

Jeff Bezos is reportedly pursuing a new project: acquiring legacy industrial and manufacturing companies and revamping them with AI technology, with an ambition to deploy up to $100 billion in capital.



据报道，杰夫·贝索斯正在主导一个新项目：收购传统工业和制造业企业，并用AI技术对其进行改造升级，计划部署资本规模高达1000亿美元。这标志着贝索斯将个人投资重心从太空（蓝色起源）扩展到实体经济AI化改造赛道。
Jeff Bezos is reportedly pursuing a new project: acquiring legacy industrial and manufacturing companies and revamping them with AI technology, with an ambition to deploy up to $100 billion in capital.



据报道，杰夫·贝索斯正在主导一个新项目：收购传统工业和制造业企业，并用AI技术对其进行改造升级，计划部署资本规模高达1000亿美元。这标志着贝索斯将个人投资重心从太空（蓝色起源）扩展到实体经济AI化改造赛道。
Source: TechCrunch ↗来源: TechCrunch ↗
acquisitionacquisition Mar 19 ★

OpenAI acquires Astral, developer of Python tools uv, Ruff, and ty, to accelerate CodexOpenAI 收购 Python 工具公司 Astral，加速 Codex 开发

OpenAI announced the acquisition of Astral, the company behind widely-used Python developer tools uv, Ruff, and ty — totaling hundreds of millions of downloads per month. The Astral team will join OpenAI's Codex team, which has seen 3x user growth and 5x usage increase since the start of 2026 with over 2 million weekly active users. OpenAI plans to continue supporting Astral's open source tools after the deal closes, while integrating the toolchain into the Codex software development workflow.



OpenAI 宣布收购 Astral，即 Python 开发者工具 uv、Ruff、ty 的开发公司，这三款工具月下载量高达数亿次。Astral 团队将加入 OpenAI 的 Codex 团队。Codex 自 2026 年初以来用户数增长 3 倍、使用量增长 5 倍，每周活跃用户超 200 万。收购完成后，Astral 的开源工具将继续维护，并深度整合进 Codex 的软件开发工作流中。
OpenAI announced the acquisition of Astral, the company behind widely-used Python developer tools uv, Ruff, and ty — totaling hundreds of millions of downloads per month. The Astral team will join OpenAI's Codex team, which has seen 3x user growth and 5x usage increase since the start of 2026 with over 2 million weekly active users. OpenAI plans to continue supporting Astral's open source tools after the deal closes, while integrating the toolchain into the Codex software development workflow.



OpenAI 宣布收购 Astral，即 Python 开发者工具 uv、Ruff、ty 的开发公司，这三款工具月下载量高达数亿次。Astral 团队将加入 OpenAI 的 Codex 团队。Codex 自 2026 年初以来用户数增长 3 倍、使用量增长 5 倍，每周活跃用户超 200 万。收购完成后，Astral 的开源工具将继续维护，并深度整合进 Codex 的软件开发工作流中。
Source: OpenAI ↗来源: OpenAI ↗
Models模型 Mar 19

Microsoft launches MAI-Image-2, ranking #3 globally on Arena.ai text-to-image leaderboard微软发布 MAI-Image-2 文生图模型，全球排名第三

Microsoft announced MAI-Image-2, its second-generation text-to-image model, debuting at #3 on the Arena.ai text-to-image leaderboard globally. The model features enhanced photorealism with accurate lighting and skin tones, reliable in-image text generation for posters and infographics, and rich scene generation for cinematic or surreal compositions. Available immediately in the MAI Playground.



微软发布 MAI-Image-2 文生图模型，在 Arena.ai 全球文生图排行榜中位列第三。新模型主打三大能力：增强的照片级写实效果（自然光影、准确肤色）、可靠的图内文字生成（适合海报、信息图）、以及复杂场景生成能力。现已在 MAI Playground 中开放试用。
Microsoft announced MAI-Image-2, its second-generation text-to-image model, debuting at #3 on the Arena.ai text-to-image leaderboard globally. The model features enhanced photorealism with accurate lighting and skin tones, reliable in-image text generation for posters and infographics, and rich scene generation for cinematic or surreal compositions. Available immediately in the MAI Playground.



微软发布 MAI-Image-2 文生图模型，在 Arena.ai 全球文生图排行榜中位列第三。新模型主打三大能力：增强的照片级写实效果（自然光影、准确肤色）、可靠的图内文字生成（适合海报、信息图）、以及复杂场景生成能力。现已在 MAI Playground 中开放试用。
Source: Microsoft AI ↗来源: Microsoft AI ↗
Products产品 Mar 18

Mistral launches Forge, an enterprise platform for custom AI model trainingMistral 发布 Forge：企业自定义 AI 模型训练平台

Mistral introduced Forge at NVIDIA GTC, a platform designed for enterprises and public sector organizations to build frontier-grade AI models grounded in their own proprietary data. Forge covers the full model lifecycle — creation, specialization, and continuous improvement — using Mistral's open-weight model library (including Mistral Small 4) without requiring customers to expose their data to the cloud.



Mistral 在 NVIDIA GTC 上发布 Forge，一个面向企业和公共机构的 AI 模型训练平台。企业可以在自有数据基础上构建、微调和迭代模型，覆盖完整模型生命周期，数据无需上传至云端。基础模型库包含 Mistral Small 4 等开源权重模型。
Mistral introduced Forge at NVIDIA GTC, a platform designed for enterprises and public sector organizations to build frontier-grade AI models grounded in their own proprietary data. Forge covers the full model lifecycle — creation, specialization, and continuous improvement — using Mistral's open-weight model library (including Mistral Small 4) without requiring customers to expose their data to the cloud.



Mistral 在 NVIDIA GTC 上发布 Forge，一个面向企业和公共机构的 AI 模型训练平台。企业可以在自有数据基础上构建、微调和迭代模型，覆盖完整模型生命周期，数据无需上传至云端。基础模型库包含 Mistral Small 4 等开源权重模型。
Source: Mistral ↗来源: Mistral ↗
Models模型 Mar 18 ★

MiniMax releases M2.7, its first self-evolving AI model with agent harness capabilitiesMiniMax 发布 M2.7：首个自我进化 AI 模型，SOTA 软件工程性能

MiniMax released M2.7, its first model to participate in its own development through self-evolution. The model achieves 56.22% on SWE-Pro and 57.0% on Terminal Bench 2, approaching Claude Opus-level performance. M2.7 is capable of building complex agent harnesses, managing Agent Teams, and completing long-horizon productivity tasks. It maintains a 97% skill adherence rate with over 40 complex skills. Available via MiniMax Agent platform and API.



MiniMax 发布 M2.7，其首个深度参与自身进化的 AI 模型。在 SWE-Pro 基准测试中得分 56.22%，Terminal Bench 2 得分 57.0%，接近 Claude Opus 水平。M2.7 能够构建复杂 Agent 任务链，管理 Agent 团队，支持动态工具搜索，并在 40 多个复杂技能中保持 97% 的执行准确率。现已通过 MiniMax Agent 平台及 API 对外开放。
MiniMax released M2.7, its first model to participate in its own development through self-evolution. The model achieves 56.22% on SWE-Pro and 57.0% on Terminal Bench 2, approaching Claude Opus-level performance. M2.7 is capable of building complex agent harnesses, managing Agent Teams, and completing long-horizon productivity tasks. It maintains a 97% skill adherence rate with over 40 complex skills. Available via MiniMax Agent platform and API.



MiniMax 发布 M2.7，其首个深度参与自身进化的 AI 模型。在 SWE-Pro 基准测试中得分 56.22%，Terminal Bench 2 得分 57.0%，接近 Claude Opus 水平。M2.7 能够构建复杂 Agent 任务链，管理 Agent 团队，支持动态工具搜索，并在 40 多个复杂技能中保持 97% 的执行准确率。现已通过 MiniMax Agent 平台及 API 对外开放。

Funding融资 Mar 17

Another deep tech chip startup becomes a unicorn芯片散热初创 Frore 估值达 16.4 亿美元，黄仁勋亲自推动转型

Under the guidance of NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang, chip cooling startup Frore pivoted from solid-state cooling to liquid cooling technology, raising $143 million at a $1.64 billion valuation. Surging AI chip power consumption is driving demand for cooling infrastructure, making Frore the latest deep tech company to reach unicorn status.



在 NVIDIA CEO 黄仁勋的推动下，芯片散热初创公司 Frore 从固态散热转向液冷技术，完成 1.43 亿美元融资，估值达到 16.4 亿美元。AI 芯片功耗飙升带动散热基础设施需求，Frore 成为最新一家跨入独角兽行列的深科技公司。
在 NVIDIA CEO 黄仁勋的推动下，芯片散热初创公司 Frore 从固态散热转向液冷技术，完成 1.43 亿美元融资，估值达到 16.4 亿美元。AI 芯片功耗飙升带动散热基础设施需求，Frore 成为最新一家跨入独角兽行列的深科技公司。
Source: Techcrunch ↗来源: Techcrunch ↗
Models模型 Mar 17

OpenAI releases GPT-5.4 mini and nano, its most capable small modelsOpenAI 发布 GPT-5.4 mini 和 nano 小型高效模型

OpenAI released GPT-5.4 mini and GPT-5.4 nano, bringing many capabilities of the GPT-5.4 flagship to faster, more cost-efficient models. Both are available in the API, Codex, and ChatGPT — mini is accessible to free users. The models are designed for high-volume, latency-sensitive workloads including coding assistants and multi-modal pipelines, running more than twice as fast as previous GPT-5 mini variants.



OpenAI 发布 GPT-5.4 mini 和 nano，将旗舰模型的能力下放到更快、更高性价比的版本。两款模型同步上线 API、Codex 和 ChatGPT，免费用户也可使用 mini 版本。主打高并发、低延迟场景（代理、编码助手、多模态工作流），速度较上代 GPT-5 mini 提升 2 倍以上。
OpenAI 发布 GPT-5.4 mini 和 nano，响应速度较上代提升 2 倍，主打高并发、低延迟场景（代理、编码助手、多模态工作流）。两款模型同步上线 API、Codex 和 ChatGPT，免费用户也可使用 mini 版本。
Source: OpenAI ↗来源: OpenAI ↗
Models模型 Mar 17

Mistral Releases Leanstral CommentsMistral 发布 Leanstral Comments 模型

Mistral releases Leanstral Comments, a lightweight model focused on code review and comment generation for developer workflows.



Mistral 发布 Leanstral Comments——专注代码审查和注释生成的轻量模型，面向开发者工作流优化。
Mistral 发布 Leanstral Comments——专注代码审查和注释生成的轻量模型，面向开发者工作流优化。

Models模型 Mar 16

Mistral releases Mistral Small 4, a 119B-parameter open-source MoE modelMistral 发布 Small 4：119B 参数开源 MoE 多模态模型

Mistral released Mistral Small 4, a 119B-parameter Mixture-of-Experts model under the Apache 2.0 open-source license. The model unifies instruct, reasoning, vision, and coding capabilities in a single architecture (128 experts). It was announced alongside the Forge enterprise training platform at NVIDIA GTC and represents the next major release in the Mistral Small family.



Mistral 发布 Mistral Small 4，119B 参数混合专家（MoE）架构，Apache 2.0 开源协议。整合文本理解、图像识别、推理和代码能力于单一模型（128 个专家网络）。该模型在 NVIDIA GTC 上与 Forge 企业训练平台同步发布，是 Mistral Small 家族的重大升级。
Mistral 发布 Mistral Small 4，119B 参数混合专家（MoE）架构，Apache 2.0 开源协议。整合文本理解、图像识别、推理和代码能力于单一模型，是 Mistral Small 家族的重大升级。同期作为 Forge 平台的基础模型库对外开放。
Source: Mistral ↗来源: Mistral ↗
Funding融资 Mar 14 ★

The $32B acquisition that one VC is calling the 'Deal of the Decade'Google 320亿美元收购 Wiz，史上最大风险投资并购案

Index Ventures Partner Shardul Shah says cybersecurity startup Wiz sits "at the center of three tailwinds: AI, cloud, and security spend." Those tailwinds powered what just became the largest venture-backed acquisition in history — Google's $32 billion deal for Wiz, finalized after Wiz declined Google's earlier $23B offer in 2024.

So what? Cybersecurity is now table stakes for enterprise AI. By acquiring Wiz, Google gets the leading cloud security platform and closes a major gap against Microsoft's security portfolio. This is a bet that the next wave of AI adoption runs through securing cloud infrastructure.



Index Ventures 合伙人 Shardul Shah 说，网络安全初创公司 Wiz 站在「AI、云计算、安全支出」三大顺风的交叉口。这三股力量共同推动了这笔创投史上最大并购案——Google 以 320 亿美元完成对 Wiz 的收购，此前 Wiz 曾于 2024 年拒绝了 Google 230 亿美元的报价。

网络安全已成为企业 AI 的标配。通过收购 Wiz，Google 获得领先的云安全平台，缩小了与微软安全产品组合的差距。这是一个押注：AI 下一波应用浪潮的关键在于保护云基础设施。
Index Ventures 合伙人 Shardul Shah 说，网络安全初创公司 Wiz 站在「AI、云计算、安全支出」三大顺风的交叉口。这三股力量共同推动了这笔创投史上最大并购案——Google 以 320 亿美元完成对 Wiz 的收购，此前 Wiz 曾于 2024 年拒绝了 Google 230 亿美元的报价。
Source: Techcrunch ↗来源: Techcrunch ↗
Funding融资 Mar 10

Sandberg, Clegg join Nscale board as this 'Stargate Norway' startup hits $14.6B valuationSandberg 和 Clegg 加入 Nscale 董事会，「挪威星际之门」估值达 146 亿美元

Nvidia-backed British AI infrastructure startup Nscale has raised another megaround of $2 billion, lifting its valuation to $14.6B. Former Meta COO Sheryl Sandberg and former UK Deputy Prime Minister Nick Clegg have both joined its board.

So what? AI infrastructure is the arms race that won't slow down. Nscale landing two of tech/politics' most prominent names signals it's positioning as a serious European alternative to US hyperscalers — and the "Stargate Norway" framing is a deliberate play for sovereign AI infrastructure contracts.



英伟达支持的英国 AI 基础设施初创公司 Nscale 完成新一轮 20 亿美元融资，估值升至 146 亿美元。前 Meta COO Sheryl Sandberg 与前英国副首相 Nick Clegg 双双加入其董事会。Nscale 被称为「挪威星际之门」，专注于为 AI 训练和推理提供算力基础设施。
英伟达支持的英国 AI 基础设施初创公司 Nscale 完成新一轮 20 亿美元融资，估值升至 146 亿美元。前 Meta COO Sheryl Sandberg 与前英国副首相 Nick Clegg 双双加入其董事会。Nscale 被称为「挪威星际之门」，专注于为 AI 训练和推理提供算力基础设施。
Source: Techcrunch ↗来源: Techcrunch ↗
Industry行业 Mar 9

OpenAI acquires Promptfoo, an AI security testing platformOpenAI 收购 AI 安全测试平台 Promptfoo

OpenAI is acquiring Promptfoo, an AI security platform used by over 25% of Fortune 500 companies, with a widely-used open-source CLI for evaluating and red-teaming LLM applications. Once finalized, Promptfoo's capabilities will be integrated into OpenAI Frontier — the platform for building and operating AI coworkers — bringing native security testing, red-teaming, and oversight tooling to enterprise AI deployments.

So what? As agents get deployed into real workflows, security and eval infrastructure become table stakes. OpenAI buying Promptfoo signals they want to own that layer end-to-end inside Frontier rather than leaving it to third parties. The open-source project continues, but the enterprise roadmap now runs through OpenAI.



OpenAI 宣布收购 Promptfoo——一个被超过 25% 的财富 500 强公司使用的 AI 安全测试平台，拥有广泛使用的开源 CLI。收购后将把 Promptfoo 的安全测试和红队能力整合进 OpenAI Frontier 企业平台，帮助部署 AI Agent 的企业自动发现提示注入、数据泄露等漏洞。
OpenAI 宣布收购 Promptfoo——一个被超过 25% 的财富 500 强公司使用的 AI 安全测试平台，拥有广泛使用的开源 CLI。收购后将把 Promptfoo 的安全测试和红队能力整合进 OpenAI Frontier 企业平台，帮助部署 AI Agent 的企业自动发现提示注入、数据泄露等漏洞。
Source: OpenAI ↗来源: OpenAI ↗
Products产品 Mar 6

AWS launches Amazon Connect Health: Agentic AI for healthcareAWS 发布 亚马逊 Connect Health: Agentic AI for healthcare

AWS announces Amazon Connect Health, a purpose-built agentic AI solution that handles high-volume administrative tasks — appointment scheduling, clinical documentation, and medical coding — with real-time EHR access and insurance eligibility checks.

So what? AWS is betting that AI agents can eat healthcare admin — scheduling, billing, patient engagement. If this works at scale, it's a template for every vertical. The "AI agent platform" play is now AWS vs Google vs Microsoft, sector by sector.



AWS 发布 Amazon Connect Health，专为医疗行业打造的代理 AI 解决方案，处理高频行政任务——预约排期、临床文档记录、医疗编码——实时访问 EHR 和保险资格核查。AWS 赌 AI 代理能吃掉医疗行政——排班、计费、患者沟通。如果大规模跑通，将成为各垂直行业的模板。
AWS 发布 Amazon Connect Health，专为医疗行业打造的代理 AI 解决方案，处理高频行政任务——预约排期、临床文档记录、医疗编码——实时访问 EHR 和保险资格核查。AWS 赌 AI 代理能吃掉医疗行政——排班、计费、患者沟通。如果大规模跑通，将成为各垂直行业的模板。
Source: AWS Blog ↗来源: AWS Blog ↗
Models模型 Mar 6

Google releases Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite, most cost-effective model yetGoogle 发布 Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite, most cost-effective model yet

Google releases Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite, available in preview via Gemini API in Google AI Studio and Vertex AI. Positioned as their most cost-effective AI model to date.

So what? The race to the bottom on inference cost continues. Google is making the "good enough" tier cheaper and more accessible, which matters for agent architectures where you're chaining many calls.



Google 发布 Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite，通过 Gemini API 在 Google AI Studio 和 Vertex AI 预览。定位为目前最具成本效益的 AI 模型。推理成本的底部竞赛持续进行。Google 把「够用」层做得更便宜更普及——对代理架构中链式调用场景很重要。
Google 发布 Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite，通过 Gemini API 在 Google AI Studio 和 Vertex AI 预览。定位为目前最具成本效益的 AI 模型。推理成本的底部竞赛持续进行。Google 把「够用」层做得更便宜更普及——对代理架构中链式调用场景很重要。
Source: Google Blog ↗来源: Google Blog ↗
Products产品 Mar 6 ★

It’s official: The Pentagon has labeled Anthropic a supply-chain risk The Depart五角大楼正式将 Anthropic 列为供应链风险

ment of Defense has officially labeled Anthropic a supply-chain risk, making the AI firm the first American company with the label. Meanwhile, the DOD continues to use Anthropic's AI in Iran.



美国国防部正式将 Anthropic 列为供应链风险，使其成为首家获此标签的美国公司。同时 DOD 继续在伊朗行动中使用 Anthropic 的 AI。
美国国防部正式将 Anthropic 列为供应链风险，使其成为首家获此标签的美国公司。同时 DOD 继续在伊朗行动中使用 Anthropic 的 AI。

Models模型 Mar 6 ★

OpenAI launches GPT-5.4 with Pro and Thinking versionsOpenAI 发布 GPT-5.4 with Pro and Thinking versions

OpenAI releases GPT-5.4 in three variants: GPT-5.3 Instant (fast everyday tasks), GPT-5.4 Thinking (professional workflows with reasoning), and GPT-5.4 Pro. Features an opt-in 1M token context window. GPT-5.4 Thinking replaces GPT-5.2 Thinking, which sunsets in 3 months.

So what? Two days after GPT-5.3, OpenAI ships 5.4 — the iteration speed is insane. The Thinking variant signals reasoning models are now the default frontier, not a side experiment. 1M context opt-in is a quiet but significant infrastructure shift for agent builders.



OpenAI 发布 GPT-5.4 三个版本：GPT-5.3 Instant（日常快速任务）、GPT-5.4 Thinking（带推理的专业工作流）和 GPT-5.4 Pro。支持可选的 100 万 token 上下文窗口。GPT-5.4 Thinking 替代 GPT-5.2 Thinking（三个月后下线）。GPT-5.3 发布两天后就出 5.4——迭代速度疯狂。Thinking 版本说明推理模型已成为默认前沿方向。100 万上下文是代理开发者的重要基础设施升级。
OpenAI 发布 GPT-5.4 三个版本：GPT-5.3 Instant（日常快速任务）、GPT-5.4 Thinking（带推理的专业工作流）和 GPT-5.4 Pro。支持可选的 100 万 token 上下文窗口。GPT-5.4 Thinking 替代 GPT-5.2 Thinking（三个月后下线）。GPT-5.3 发布两天后就出 5.4——迭代速度疯狂。Thinking 版本说明推理模型已成为默认前沿方向。100 万上下文是代理开发者的重要基础设施升级。

Figure AI announces Figure 03, a consumer-grade humanoid robot designed for home assistance, priced under $50K.

Figure AI 公布 Figure 03，面向家庭辅助的消费级人形机器人，售价低于 $50K。人形机器人从工厂车间走进客厅。Jetsons 的时间线成真了。十年级别的大趋势，投资含义巨大。

Feb
Products产品 Feb 27

Anthropic launches Claude Code Security in limited research previewAnthropic 发布 Claude Code Security，进入限量研究预览

Anthropic launches Claude Code Security, a new capability built into Claude Code on the web, in a limited research preview for Enterprise and Team customers (with expedited access for open-source maintainers). Unlike rule-based static analysis tools, it reasons about code like a human security researcher — tracing data flow, understanding component interactions, and catching complex vulnerabilities such as broken access control and business logic flaws. Findings go through a multi-stage verification process to filter false positives before reaching analysts.

So what? AI-generated code is flooding codebases faster than human reviewers can audit it. Anthropic is positioning Claude Code Security as the defense layer against AI-enabled attacks — using the same frontier reasoning capabilities that could help attackers to instead put power in defenders' hands. Releasing as a research preview first is deliberate: the dual-use risk is real, and they want to refine deployment guardrails before scaling.



Anthropic 推出 Claude Code Security——内置于 Claude Code 网页版的代码安全扫描能力，目前面向 Enterprise 和 Team 客户开放限量研究预览，开源仓库维护者可申请加速访问。与传统规则匹配的静态分析不同，它像人类安全研究员一样理解代码组件交互和数据流，能发现逻辑漏洞和访问控制缺陷。每条发现经过多阶段验证，自动过滤误报并分级严重程度。
Anthropic 推出 Claude Code Security——内置于 Claude Code 网页版的代码安全扫描能力，目前面向 Enterprise 和 Team 客户开放限量研究预览，开源仓库维护者可申请加速访问。与传统规则匹配的静态分析不同，它像人类安全研究员一样理解代码组件交互和数据流，能发现逻辑漏洞和访问控制缺陷。每条发现经过多阶段验证，自动过滤误报并分级严重程度。
Source: Anthropic ↗来源: Anthropic ↗
Models模型 Feb 19 ★

Google Releases Gemini 3.1 ProGoogle 发布 Gemini 3.1 Pro

Google released Gemini 3.1 Pro on February 19, 2026, a significant upgrade to the core intelligence behind Gemini 3, featuring a 1 million token context window and state-of-the-art performance on ARC-AGI-2 (77.1%) and other advanced benchmarks. The model significantly outperforms Gemini 3 Pro across reasoning and multimodal capabilities spanning text, images, audio, video, and code. Gemini 3.1 Pro rolled out immediately to the Gemini app as well as NotebookLM for Google AI Pro and Ultra subscribers. The release was part of Google's broader February 2026 AI drop that also included the Lyria 3 music generation model.



Google 发布 Gemini 3.1 Pro，100 万 token 上下文窗口，ARC-AGI-2 达 77.1%。推理和多模态能力大幅超越 Gemini 3 Pro，覆盖文本、图片、音频、视频和代码。立即登陆 Gemini 应用和 NotebookLM。这是 Google 2026 年 2 月 AI 大更新的一部分，同期还发布了 Lyria 3 音乐生成模型。
Google 发布 Gemini 3.1 Pro，100 万 token 上下文窗口，ARC-AGI-2 达 77.1%。推理和多模态能力大幅超越 Gemini 3 Pro，覆盖文本、图片、音频、视频和代码。立即登陆 Gemini 应用和 NotebookLM。这是 Google 2026 年 2 月 AI 大更新的一部分，同期还发布了 Lyria 3 音乐生成模型。

Anthropic Releases Claude Sonnet 4.6Anthropic 发布 Claude Sonnet 4.6

Anthropic released Claude Sonnet 4.6, the latest iteration in the Claude 4 Sonnet line featuring enhanced coding abilities, improved factual accuracy, and better performance on complex reasoning tasks. The model continued Anthropic's rapid iteration cadence on the mid-tier model that serves the majority of Claude API traffic. Claude Sonnet 4.6 maintained the balance of high capability and cost-efficiency that made the Sonnet family the default choice for most enterprise deployments.



Anthropic 发布 Claude Sonnet 4.6，Claude 4 Sonnet 系列最新迭代，编程能力增强、事实准确性提升、复杂推理表现更好。延续 Anthropic 在承载大部分 API 流量的中端模型上的快速迭代节奏。Sonnet 家族凭借高能力和高性价比的平衡，继续作为多数企业部署的默认选择。

Models模型 Feb 14

ByteDance Releases Doubao 2.0 — Agentic AI for Complex Real-World Tasks字节跳动 发布 Doubao 2.0 — Agentic AI for Complex Real-World Tasks

ByteDance releases Doubao 2.0, an advanced model positioned for the "agent era" — designed to execute complex, multi-step real-world tasks rather than just answering questions.

So what? Doubao 2.0 is ByteDance's agentic pivot: from chatbot to AI operator. With TikTok-scale distribution behind it and Volcano Engine's enterprise contracts, ByteDance is moving up the value chain from model provider to task executor. If Doubao 2.0 can run workflows inside enterprise systems the way Doubao runs feeds on phones, ByteDance becomes a genuine enterprise AI threat.



字节跳动发布豆包 2.0，面向「代理时代」的高级模型——设计用于执行复杂多步真实任务而不只是回答问题。豆包 2.0 是字节的代理化转型：从聊天机器人到 AI 执行者。TikTok 级分发能力加持，火山引擎的企业合同做后盾——如果豆包 2.0 能在企业系统里跑工作流就像在手机上跑信息流一样顺畅，字节就成了真正的企业 AI 威胁。
字节跳动发布豆包 2.0，面向「代理时代」的高级模型——设计用于执行复杂多步真实任务而不只是回答问题。豆包 2.0 是字节的代理化转型：从聊天机器人到 AI 执行者。TikTok 级分发能力加持，火山引擎的企业合同做后盾——如果豆包 2.0 能在企业系统里跑工作流就像在手机上跑信息流一样顺畅，字节就成了真正的企业 AI 威胁。

Models模型 Feb 12 ★

Google Updates Gemini 3 Deep Think for Science and EngineeringGoogle 更新 Gemini 3 Deep Think，面向科学与工程

Google DeepMind released a major upgrade to Gemini 3 Deep Think in February 2026, specifically designed for the complexities of science, research, and engineering where data is messy and solutions aren't black-and-white. The updated Deep Think mode uses iterative rounds of reasoning to explore multiple hypotheses simultaneously, enabling breakthroughs on hard scientific and mathematical problems. It became available to Google AI Ultra subscribers in the Gemini app and via the Gemini API for select researchers and enterprises. The update preceded Gemini 3.1 Pro by one week, establishing Deep Think as Google's premier reasoning capability for frontier research.



Google DeepMind 大幅升级 Gemini 3 Deep Think，专为科学、研究和工程中数据混乱、答案不确定的场景设计。升级版 Deep Think 用迭代多轮推理同时探索多个假设，在硬科学和数学问题上实现突破。面向 Google AI Ultra 订阅者和部分研究者及企业开放。在 Gemini 3.1 Pro 发布前一周上线。
Google DeepMind 大幅升级 Gemini 3 Deep Think，专为科学、研究和工程中数据混乱、答案不确定的场景设计。升级版 Deep Think 用迭代多轮推理同时探索多个假设，在硬科学和数学问题上实现突破。面向 Google AI Ultra 订阅者和部分研究者及企业开放。在 Gemini 3.1 Pro 发布前一周上线。

OpenAI Releases GPT-5.3-Codex — Most Capable Coding ModelOpenAI 发布 GPT-5.3-Codex — Most Capable Coding Model

OpenAI released GPT-5.3-Codex on February 5, 2026, advancing both frontier coding performance and reasoning/professional knowledge in a single model that is also 25% faster than GPT-5.2-Codex. The model set new benchmarks for agentic software engineering, enabling Codex to tackle longer, more complex real-world engineering workflows with improved judgment on ambiguous tasks. It launched three days after the Codex desktop app, cementing OpenAI's position in the rapidly growing AI coding agent market. GPT-5.3-Codex marked OpenAI's most direct challenge to Anthropic Claude Code and Google Jules.



OpenAI 发布 GPT-5.3-Codex，同时提升前沿编程能力和推理/专业知识，速度比 GPT-5.2-Codex 快 25%。在代理软件工程领域刷新基准，让 Codex 能处理更长更复杂的真实工程工作流。在 Codex 桌面应用上线三天后发布，巩固 OpenAI 在 AI 编程代理市场的地位。直接叫板 Anthropic Claude Code 和 Google Jules。
OpenAI 发布 GPT-5.3-Codex，同时提升前沿编程能力和推理/专业知识，速度比 GPT-5.2-Codex 快 25%。在代理软件工程领域刷新基准，让 Codex 能处理更长更复杂的真实工程工作流。在 Codex 桌面应用上线三天后发布，巩固 OpenAI 在 AI 编程代理市场的地位。直接叫板 Anthropic Claude Code 和 Google Jules。

Anthropic Positions Claude as an Ad-Free Space to ThinkAnthropic 定位 Claude as an Ad-Free Space to Think

Anthropic published a statement committing to keeping Claude.ai an ad-free, distraction-free environment focused on genuine helpfulness. The announcement differentiated Claude from ad-supported AI services by emphasizing user trust and privacy. Anthropic articulated its philosophy that AI assistants should serve users' thinking rather than monetizing their attention. This positioning reinforced Anthropic's mission-driven approach to AI deployment distinct from advertising-dependent platforms.



Anthropic 公开承诺保持 Claude.ai 无广告、无干扰、专注真正帮助用户的环境。将 Claude 与广告支持的 AI 服务区分开，强调用户信任和隐私。Anthropic 表达了「AI 助手应服务于用户思考而非变现用户注意力」的理念。

Products产品 Feb 2

OpenAI Launches Codex Desktop AppOpenAI 发布 Codex 桌面应用

OpenAI launched the Codex desktop app (macOS) on February 2, 2026, a focused development environment for running and managing Codex agent threads in parallel with built-in worktree support, automations, and Git integration. Built with Electron for cross-platform expansion, the app functions as a command center for developers working with Codex agents across multiple tasks simultaneously. It arrived alongside GPT-5.2-Codex and GPT-5.3-Codex, positioning the Codex ecosystem as a comprehensive AI-native IDE alternative. Windows support was announced as "coming very soon" at launch.



OpenAI 上线 Codex 桌面应用（macOS），专为并行运行和管理多个 Codex 代理线程设计，内置 worktree 支持、自动化和 Git 集成。用 Electron 构建，为跨平台扩展做准备。定位为全面的 AI 原生 IDE 替代方案。Windows 版即将推出。
OpenAI 上线 Codex 桌面应用（macOS），专为并行运行和管理多个 Codex 代理线程设计，内置 worktree 支持、自动化和 Git 集成。用 Electron 构建，为跨平台扩展做准备。定位为全面的 AI 原生 IDE 替代方案。Windows 版即将推出。

Jan
Industry行业 Jan 30 ★

Claude Powers First AI-Planned Drive on MarsClaude 驱动 First AI-Planned Drive on Mars

NASA's Jet Propulsion Laboratory announced on January 30, 2026 that Anthropic's Claude had successfully planned and executed the first fully AI-directed drive of the Perseverance Mars rover, marking a historic milestone in autonomous space exploration. Claude analyzed the same imagery and terrain data that human mission planners use to generate waypoints, enabling the rover to safely navigate challenging Martian terrain without direct human planning. The initiative was coordinated from JPL's Rover Operations Center in collaboration with Anthropic. This made Claude the first AI model to autonomously operate a spacecraft on another planet, opening the door to faster, more efficient Mars science campaigns.



NASA 喷气推进实验室宣布 Anthropic 的 Claude 成功规划并执行了 Perseverance 火星车的首次全 AI 自主驾驶。Claude 分析与人类任务规划员相同的图像和地形数据来生成路径点，让火星车在无需人类规划的情况下安全穿越复杂火星地形。Claude 成为首个在另一颗星球上自主操控航天器的 AI 模型，为更快更高效的火星科学任务打开大门。
NASA 喷气推进实验室宣布 Anthropic 的 Claude 成功规划并执行了 Perseverance 火星车的首次全 AI 自主驾驶。Claude 分析与人类任务规划员相同的图像和地形数据来生成路径点，让火星车在无需人类规划的情况下安全穿越复杂火星地形。Claude 成为首个在另一颗星球上自主操控航天器的 AI 模型，为更快更高效的火星科学任务打开大门。
Source: NASA JPL ↗来源: NASA JPL ↗

Unitree Robots Perform Martial Arts at China's 2026 Spring Festival GalaUnitree Robots 表演 Martial Arts at China's 2026 Spring Festival Gala

Unitree Robotics brought humanoid robots to China's CCTV Spring Festival Gala (春晚) — the most-watched TV event in the world with over 1 billion viewers. Their robots performed kung fu alongside martial arts students from Henan Tagou School, executing backflips and human-robot sparring sequences. The moment marked the mainstream cultural arrival of Chinese robotics and followed Unitree's announcement of 10,000+ unit annual production targets.



宇树科技的人形机器人登上央视春晚——全球收视超 10 亿的电视盛事。机器人与河南塔沟武校学生同台表演武术，完成后空翻和人机对打。中国机器人产业的主流文化亮相时刻。宇树同时公布年产万台以上的产能目标。

Qwen 3.5 Open-Source ReleaseQwen 3.5 开源 Release

Alibaba releases Qwen 3.5, a frontier open-source model competitive with GPT-5 on reasoning and multilingual tasks.

OpenAI Releases GPT-5.2-Codex for Agentic CodingOpenAI 发布 GPT-5.2-Codex for Agentic Coding

OpenAI released GPT-5.2-Codex on January 14, 2026, a version of GPT-5.2 further optimized for complex, real-world software engineering tasks. It achieved state-of-the-art results on SWE-Bench Pro (56.4%) and Terminal-Bench 2.0 (64.0%), excelling at long-horizon coding tasks, large-scale code transformations, and cybersecurity challenges. The model was immediately available to paid ChatGPT users in all Codex surfaces. GPT-5.2-Codex established the new standard for AI-assisted software engineering and signaled OpenAI's intent to dominate the developer tooling market.



OpenAI 发布 GPT-5.2-Codex，进一步优化真实世界复杂软件工程任务。SWE-Bench Pro 达 56.4%、Terminal-Bench 2.0 达 64.0%，擅长长周期编程、大规模代码变换和网络安全挑战。面向付费 ChatGPT 用户的所有 Codex 界面立即可用。为 AI 辅助软件工程立下新标杆，展示 OpenAI 主导开发者工具市场的意图。
OpenAI 发布 GPT-5.2-Codex，进一步优化真实世界复杂软件工程任务。SWE-Bench Pro 达 56.4%、Terminal-Bench 2.0 达 64.0%，擅长长周期编程、大规模代码变换和网络安全挑战。面向付费 ChatGPT 用户的所有 Codex 界面立即可用。为 AI 辅助软件工程立下新标杆，展示 OpenAI 主导开发者工具市场的意图。

Funding融资 Jan 13

Deepgram Raises $130M Series C at $1.3B ValuationDeepgram 融资 $130M Series C at $1.3B Valuation

Deepgram closes $130M Series C at $1.3B valuation, led by AVP with participation from BlackRock, Twilio, ServiceNow, and existing investors. The company ends 2024 cash-flow positive with 400+ enterprise customers.

So what? Voice AI infrastructure has its first unicorn. Deepgram's cash-flow positive status is rare in AI infrastructure — proving that owning the voice layer of the AI stack is genuinely monetizable. With 200,000+ developers and growing enterprise deployments, Deepgram is becoming the "voice API layer" for the AI economy, much like Stripe is the payment layer.



Deepgram 完成 $130M C 轮融资，估值 $1.3B，AVP 领投，BlackRock、Twilio、ServiceNow 参投。2024 年底已实现现金流为正，超 400 家企业客户。语音 AI 基础设施诞生首个独角兽。Deepgram 现金流为正在 AI 基础设施领域罕见——证明拥有 AI 技术栈的语音层是真正可变现的。20 万+ 开发者和不断增长的企业部署，Deepgram 正成为 AI 经济的「语音 API 层」。

Industry行业 Jan 8 ★

Trump Signs Pro-Innovation AI Executive Order特朗普 签署 Pro-Innovation AI 行政令

President Trump signs an executive order rolling back Biden-era AI safety requirements and accelerating federal AI adoption.

So what? The US bets on speed over caution. AI companies get a green light, but the absence of guardrails means the market will self-regulate — for better or worse.



Trump 总统签署行政令，回滚拜登时代的 AI 安全要求并加速联邦 AI 采用。美国赌速度不赌谨慎。AI 公司获绿灯，但缺乏护栏意味着市场将自我监管——好坏参半。
Trump 总统签署行政令，回滚拜登时代的 AI 安全要求并加速联邦 AI 采用。美国赌速度不赌谨慎。AI 公司获绿灯，但缺乏护栏意味着市场将自我监管——好坏参半。

Robotics机器人 Jan 7 ★

CES 2026: Humanoid Robots Take Center StageCES 2026: 人形机器人s 成为焦点

CES 2026 became the "Year of the Humanoid Robot," with every major robotics company showcasing next-generation systems. Highlights included Boston Dynamics' Atlas commercial debut, NEURA Robotics' 4NE1 Gen 3 (cognitive humanoid), AgiBot's consumer-facing Genie, and dozens of other entrants. The sheer volume of humanoid demonstrations signaled that the robotics industry had crossed from research curiosity to commercial product cycle.



CES 2026 成为「人形机器人之年」，所有主要机器人公司都展示了下一代系统。亮点包括 Boston Dynamics 的 Atlas 商用首秀、NEURA Robotics 的 4NE1 Gen 3 认知人形机器人、AgiBot 面向消费者的 Genie 等。人形机器人演示的密度说明行业已从研究好奇心跨入商业产品周期。
CES 2026 成为「人形机器人之年」，所有主要机器人公司都展示了下一代系统。亮点包括 Boston Dynamics 的 Atlas 商用首秀、NEURA Robotics 的 4NE1 Gen 3 认知人形机器人、AgiBot 面向消费者的 Genie 等。人形机器人演示的密度说明行业已从研究好奇心跨入商业产品周期。

Models模型 Dec 22

Zhipu GLM-4.7 — $3/Month Coding AI Challenges $200 Premium Tools智谱 GLM-4.7 — 3 美元/月编程 AI 挑战 200 美元高端工具

Z.ai (Zhipu) releases GLM-4.7, an open-source AI coding model matching premium competitors on key benchmarks at $3/month (or free locally), directly challenging tools costing 60x more.

So what? China's AI price war hit developer tools. GLM-4.7 benchmarks against GitHub Copilot and Cursor while pricing at $3/month commercial or free for local deployment. As Chinese labs race toward Hong Kong IPOs, open-source as a distribution strategy makes the global coding AI market a commodity. The $200/month AI dev tool category is under existential pressure.



Z.ai（智谱）开源 GLM-4.7 AI 编程模型，在关键基准上追平高端竞品，商业版 $3/月或本地免费部署。中国 AI 价格战打到了开发工具领域。GLM-4.7 对标 GitHub Copilot 和 Cursor，定价却只是六十分之一。中国实验室冲刺港股 IPO 之际，开源成为分发策略——$200/月的 AI 开发工具品类面临生存压力。
Z.ai（智谱）开源 GLM-4.7 AI 编程模型，在关键基准上追平高端竞品，商业版 $3/月或本地免费部署。中国 AI 价格战打到了开发工具领域。GLM-4.7 对标 GitHub Copilot 和 Cursor，定价却只是六十分之一。中国实验室冲刺港股 IPO 之际，开源成为分发策略——$200/月的 AI 开发工具品类面临生存压力。

Models模型 Dec 18 ★

Anthropic Releases Claude Opus 4.6Anthropic 发布 Claude Opus 4.6

Anthropic released Claude Opus 4.6, a significant upgrade to its flagship model featuring improved long-context reasoning, better tool use, and stronger performance on complex scientific and mathematical problems. The release demonstrated Anthropic's continued commitment to safety-focused frontier AI development. Claude Opus 4.6 pushed state-of-the-art on multiple benchmarks while maintaining Anthropic's Constitutional AI training approach.



Anthropic 发布 Claude Opus 4.6，旗舰模型重大升级，长上下文推理、工具调用和复杂科学数学问题的表现均有提升。在多项基准上刷新最优，同时保持 Constitutional AI 训练方法。
Anthropic 发布 Claude Opus 4.6，旗舰模型重大升级，长上下文推理、工具调用和复杂科学数学问题的表现均有提升。在多项基准上刷新最优，同时保持 Constitutional AI 训练方法。

Models模型 Dec 17

Xiaomi MiMo-V2-Flash — 309B MoE Challenges DeepSeek at Scale小米 MiMo-V2-Flash — 309B MoE Challenges DeepSeek at Scale

Xiaomi unveils MiMo-V2-Flash — a 309B parameter Mixture-of-Experts model (open-source) that rivals DeepSeek V3 on key benchmarks, announced alongside plans for RMB 200B in 5-year R&D investment.

So what? Xiaomi's 309B open-source MoE is proof that even hardware-first companies can compete at frontier AI scale. The pairing with a massive R&D commitment signals a strategic bet: Xiaomi's next decade is as much AI as smartphones. China's open-source AI competition is no longer between a handful of startups — it involves every major tech player.



小米亮相 MiMo-V2-Flash——309B 参数 MoE 开源模型，在关键基准上匹敌 DeepSeek V3。同时宣布 5 年 ¥2000 亿研发投入计划。小米的 309B 开源 MoE 证明硬件公司也能在前沿 AI 层面竞争。搭配大手笔研发承诺，小米下个十年的故事是 AI 和手机并重。中国开源 AI 竞争不再限于几家创业公司——每个大厂都在场。

Models模型 Dec 11 ★

OpenAI Releases GPT-5.2 with Extended ThinkingOpenAI 发布 GPT-5.2 with Extended Thinking

OpenAI released GPT-5.2 on December 11, 2025, succeeding GPT-5.1 with a family of three models: GPT-5.2 Instant, GPT-5.2 Thinking, and GPT-5.2 Extended Thinking. The Extended Thinking variant allows the model to reason longer on difficult problems, making it competitive with specialized research-grade AI systems. GPT-5.2 introduced improved instruction following and better calibration on factual questions. The rapid succession from GPT-5.1 (released just a month prior) signaled OpenAI's accelerating iteration pace in the GPT-5 generation.



OpenAI 发布 GPT-5.2，包含三款模型：GPT-5.2 Instant、GPT-5.2 Thinking 和 GPT-5.2 Extended Thinking。Extended Thinking 版本可以在难题上深度推理，与专用研究级 AI 系统竞争。距 GPT-5.1 仅一个月就推出后续版本，OpenAI 在 GPT-5 世代的迭代速度惊人。
OpenAI 发布 GPT-5.2，包含三款模型：GPT-5.2 Instant、GPT-5.2 Thinking 和 GPT-5.2 Extended Thinking。Extended Thinking 版本可以在难题上深度推理，与专用研究级 AI 系统竞争。距 GPT-5.1 仅一个月就推出后续版本，OpenAI 在 GPT-5 世代的迭代速度惊人。

White House Executive Order Establishes National AI Policy FrameworkWhite House 行政令 Establishes National AI Policy Framework

The White House issued an executive order establishing a unified national AI policy framework, signaling federal preemption of fragmented state-level AI regulations. The order explicitly criticized state algorithmic discrimination laws and conditioned federal funding on AI policy alignment.



白宫签署行政令建立统一国家 AI 政策框架，释放联邦将优先于各州碎片化 AI 监管的信号。明确批评州级算法歧视法律，将联邦资金与 AI 政策对齐挂钩。

Unitree Ships 5,000th General-Purpose Robot — Targets 20K in 2026Unitree 出货 5,000th General-Purpose Robot — Targets 20K in 2026

Unitree's 5,000th general-purpose embodied robot (Lingxi X2) rolled off the production line. The company projected 10,000-20,000 shipments in 2026, and its robots were prominently featured at China's Spring Festival Gala in February 2026, demonstrating kung fu and dance routines.



宇树科技第 5,000 台通用具身机器人（灵犀 X2）下线。预计 2026 年出货 10,000-20,000 台。其机器人在 2026 年春晚上表演武术和舞蹈引发热议。

Models模型 Dec 2

Mistral 3 — Open Frontier and Edge-Ready SLMsMistral 3 — 开源前沿与端侧小模型

Mistral releases Mistral Large 3 (41B active / 675B total sparse MoE) and Ministral 3 family (3B, 7B, 14B) — small enough to run on laptops and drones with 4GB VRAM using 4-bit quantization.

So what? Mistral is positioning itself as the "runs anywhere" open AI stack: from frontier server inference down to embedded edge devices. As enterprise AI moves to on-premise and edge-first deployments, having a credible open model across the full compute spectrum is a moat no US-closed lab can match.



Mistral 发布 Mistral Large 3（41B 激活 / 675B 总参数稀疏 MoE）和 Ministral 3 家族（3B、7B、14B）——4GB 显存用 4-bit 量化就能在笔记本和无人机上跑。Mistral 定位「随处运行」的开放 AI 技术栈：从前沿服务器推理到嵌入式边缘设备。当企业 AI 转向本地优先和边缘部署时，覆盖全算力谱的可信开源模型是美国闭源实验室无法匹敌的护城河。
Mistral 发布 Mistral Large 3（41B 激活 / 675B 总参数稀疏 MoE）和 Ministral 3 家族（3B、7B、14B）——4GB 显存用 4-bit 量化就能在笔记本和无人机上跑。Mistral 定位「随处运行」的开放 AI 技术栈：从前沿服务器推理到嵌入式边缘设备。当企业 AI 转向本地优先和边缘部署时，覆盖全算力谱的可信开源模型是美国闭源实验室无法匹敌的护城河。

Models模型 Dec 1

Amazon Nova 2 + Kiro — AWS Bets on Agentic AI at re:Invent 2025亚马逊 Nova 2 + Kiro — AWS Bets on Agentic AI at re:Invent 2025

At AWS re:Invent 2025, Amazon announces Nova 2 (complete generational upgrade) and Kiro — an agentic IDE with browser automation achieving 90%+ reliability. Amazon doubles down on enterprise AI agents across Bedrock.

So what? AWS's agent-first posture is clear: they're not competing for creative AI or chatbot mindshare — they're competing for enterprise workflow automation budgets. Nova 2 powers Bedrock; Kiro takes aim at GitHub Copilot. Amazon's strategy is infrastructure + IDE + models: control all three layers and lock in enterprise developers.



AWS re:Invent 2025 上，Amazon 发布 Nova 2（全代升级）和 Kiro——带浏览器自动化的代理 IDE，可靠性超 90%。Amazon 全力押注企业 AI 代理。AWS 的代理优先姿态清晰：不争创意 AI 或聊天机器人心智——争的是企业工作流自动化预算。Nova 2 驱动 Bedrock，Kiro 瞄准 GitHub Copilot。基础设施 + IDE + 模型三层控制，锁定企业开发者。
AWS re:Invent 2025 上，Amazon 发布 Nova 2（全代升级）和 Kiro——带浏览器自动化的代理 IDE，可靠性超 90%。Amazon 全力押注企业 AI 代理。AWS 的代理优先姿态清晰：不争创意 AI 或聊天机器人心智——争的是企业工作流自动化预算。Nova 2 驱动 Bedrock，Kiro 瞄准 GitHub Copilot。基础设施 + IDE + 模型三层控制，锁定企业开发者。

Robotics机器人 Dec 1

BMW Leipzig Factory Deploys AEON Humanoid Robots in Pilot ProgramBMW Leipzig Factory 部署 AEON 人形机器人s in Pilot Program

BMW's Leipzig plant launched a pilot program deploying AEON humanoid robots for automotive manufacturing tasks. The trial tested humanoids on real production lines for assembly assistance, part handling, and quality inspection — tasks previously requiring specialized machinery or human dexterity. BMW's entry into humanoid robot deployment validated the automotive industry's embrace of general-purpose robot workers as a near-term manufacturing reality.



BMW 莱比锡工厂启动试点项目，部署 AEON 人形机器人执行汽车制造任务。在真实产线上测试装配辅助、零件搬运和质量检测。BMW 入局验证了汽车行业将通用机器人作为近期制造现实的决心。
BMW 莱比锡工厂启动试点项目，部署 AEON 人形机器人执行汽车制造任务。在真实产线上测试装配辅助、零件搬运和质量检测。BMW 入局验证了汽车行业将通用机器人作为近期制造现实的决心。

Models模型 Nov 18 ★

Google Launches Gemini 3 — Next-Generation Flagship ModelGoogle 发布 Gemini 3 — Next-Generation Flagship Model

Google launched Gemini 3 on November 18, 2025, its most capable AI model family to date, available from day one across Search, the Gemini app, AI Studio, Vertex AI, and the Gemini CLI. The flagship Gemini 3 Pro delivered state-of-the-art performance across reasoning, multimodal understanding, coding, and science benchmarks, with native support for text, images, audio, video, and code. Google also introduced Gemini 3 Deep Think, an enhanced reasoning mode pushing the limits of scientific and engineering problem-solving. The launch marked Google's most significant AI model release since Gemini 1.0, closing the perceived capability gap with OpenAI and Anthropic.



Google 上线 Gemini 3，第一天即覆盖 Search、Gemini 应用、AI Studio、Vertex AI 和 Gemini CLI。旗舰 Gemini 3 Pro 在推理、多模态理解、编程和科学基准上均达最优，原生支持文本、图片、音频、视频和代码。还推出 Gemini 3 Deep Think 增强推理模式。这是 Google 自 Gemini 1.0 以来最重大的 AI 模型发布，缩小了与 OpenAI 和 Anthropic 的感知差距。
Google 上线 Gemini 3，第一天即覆盖 Search、Gemini 应用、AI Studio、Vertex AI 和 Gemini CLI。旗舰 Gemini 3 Pro 在推理、多模态理解、编程和科学基准上均达最优，原生支持文本、图片、音频、视频和代码。还推出 Gemini 3 Deep Think 增强推理模式。这是 Google 自 Gemini 1.0 以来最重大的 AI 模型发布，缩小了与 OpenAI 和 Anthropic 的感知差距。
Source: Google Blog ↗来源: Google Blog ↗
Models模型 Nov 13

Baidu ERNIE 5.0 — Natively Omnimodal AI Model百度 ERNIE 5.0 — Natively Omnimodal AI Model

Baidu unveils ERNIE 5.0 at Baidu World 2025 — a natively omnimodal foundation model that jointly models text, images, audio, and video. Baidu announces global expansion push.

So what? Baidu's ERNIE 5.0 natively trains on all modalities simultaneously rather than bolting them together post-hoc. In China's enterprise AI market, Baidu retains significant distribution through its search and cloud businesses. ERNIE 5.0 signals Baidu is still competing at the frontier, even as DeepSeek and ByteDance eat its consumer share.



百度在百度世界 2025 上亮相 ERNIE 5.0——原生全模态基础模型，联合建模文本、图片、音频和视频。同时宣布全球扩张计划。ERNIE 5.0 在所有模态上同时训练，而非事后拼接。在中国企业 AI 市场，百度靠搜索和云业务保有可观的分发能力。尽管 DeepSeek 和字节跳动侵蚀消费端份额，百度仍在前沿竞争。
百度在百度世界 2025 上亮相 ERNIE 5.0——原生全模态基础模型，联合建模文本、图片、音频和视频。同时宣布全球扩张计划。ERNIE 5.0 在所有模态上同时训练，而非事后拼接。在中国企业 AI 市场，百度靠搜索和云业务保有可观的分发能力。尽管 DeepSeek 和字节跳动侵蚀消费端份额，百度仍在前沿竞争。

Models模型 Nov 12 ★

OpenAI Releases GPT-5.1 with Personality CustomizationOpenAI 发布 GPT-5.1 with Personality Customization

OpenAI released GPT-5.1 on November 12, 2025, an upgrade to the GPT-5 series featuring warmer conversational tone, 8 customizable personality options, shopping research capabilities, and enhanced multimodal features. The model family launched in two primary modes: GPT-5.1 Instant for fast everyday tasks and GPT-5.1 Thinking for more complex reasoning. A week later, OpenAI added GPT-5.1-Codex-Max, an agentic coding model designed for extended autonomous software engineering tasks. GPT-5.1 marked OpenAI's first major upgrade cycle to GPT-5, refining the base model based on user feedback.



OpenAI 发布 GPT-5.1，GPT-5 系列的升级版，对话更温暖、8 种可自定义人格、购物调研功能和增强的多模态特性。两种主要模式：GPT-5.1 Instant（日常快速任务）和 GPT-5.1 Thinking（复杂推理）。一周后又加了 GPT-5.1-Codex-Max，面向长时间自主软件工程任务的代理编程模型。这是 GPT-5 的首次重大迭代升级。
OpenAI 发布 GPT-5.1，GPT-5 系列的升级版，对话更温暖、8 种可自定义人格、购物调研功能和增强的多模态特性。两种主要模式：GPT-5.1 Instant（日常快速任务）和 GPT-5.1 Thinking（复杂推理）。一周后又加了 GPT-5.1-Codex-Max，面向长时间自主软件工程任务的代理编程模型。这是 GPT-5 的首次重大迭代升级。
Source: OpenAI ↗来源: OpenAI ↗
Oct
Funding融资 Oct 28 ★

OpenAI Converts to Public Benefit CorporationOpenAI 转型 to Public Benefit Corporation

OpenAI completed its restructuring as a public benefit corporation (PBC) on October 28, 2025, after years of debate about its unusual nonprofit-controlled hybrid structure. The nonprofit entity was renamed the OpenAI Foundation and became a significant shareholder rather than the controlling entity. Microsoft received approximately 27% of OpenAI Group PBC under the new structure. The conversion cleared the path for a potential future IPO and aligned OpenAI's governance with its commercial scale, while maintaining its stated mission to develop AI for the benefit of humanity.



OpenAI 完成重组，转型为公益公司（PBC）。非营利实体更名为 OpenAI Foundation，成为重要股东而非控制方。Microsoft 在新结构下获得约 27% 股份。转型为未来 IPO 铺路，让治理结构与商业规模匹配，同时维持为人类开发 AI 的使命。
OpenAI 完成重组，转型为公益公司（PBC）。非营利实体更名为 OpenAI Foundation，成为重要股东而非控制方。Microsoft 在新结构下获得约 27% 股份。转型为未来 IPO 铺路，让治理结构与商业规模匹配，同时维持为人类开发 AI 的使命。
Source: OpenAI ↗来源: OpenAI ↗
Models模型 Oct 22

Anthropic Releases Claude Sonnet 4.5Anthropic 发布 Claude Sonnet 4.5

Anthropic released Claude Sonnet 4.5, bringing the hybrid reasoning capabilities first introduced in Opus 4.5 to the mid-tier model tier. Sonnet 4.5 offered improved coding performance, better instruction following, and enhanced multi-turn conversation quality at a lower cost than Opus. The release continued Anthropic's strategy of iterating rapidly across the full model family. Claude Sonnet 4.5 quickly became the most widely used Claude model due to its balance of capability and affordability.



Anthropic 发布 Claude Sonnet 4.5，将 Opus 4.5 引入的混合推理能力带到中端模型。编程能力增强，指令执行更好，多轮对话质量提升，成本低于 Opus。延续 Anthropic 全模型家族快速迭代策略。凭借能力与价格的平衡，迅速成为使用最广的 Claude 模型。
Anthropic 发布 Claude Sonnet 4.5，将 Opus 4.5 引入的混合推理能力带到中端模型。编程能力增强，指令执行更好，多轮对话质量提升，成本低于 Opus。延续 Anthropic 全模型家族快速迭代策略。凭借能力与价格的平衡，迅速成为使用最广的 Claude 模型。

Gemini 2.5 Flash — 1M Token Speed DemonGemini 2.5 Flash — 百万 Token 极速模型

Google releases Gemini 2.5 Flash with native thinking, 1M token context, and aggressive pricing for high-throughput applications.

So what? The "good enough and cheap" model tier gets scary good. For 90% of use cases, you don't need Opus — and that changes the economics of AI products.



Google 发布 Gemini 2.5 Flash，原生思考能力、100 万 token 上下文、高吞吐场景的激进定价。「够好又便宜」的模型层变得可怕地好。90% 的场景不需要 Opus——这改变了 AI 产品的经济学。

Grayscale files Form 10 for a Bittensor Trust, creating a regulated investment vehicle for TAO. Signals institutional interest in decentralized AI infrastructure.



Grayscale 为 Bittensor Trust 提交 Form 10 文件，创建 TAO 的合规投资工具。去中心化 AI 基础设施获得机构投资者关注。

1X Robotics Opens NEO Consumer Robot Pre-Orders1X Robotics 开放 NEO Consumer Robot Pre-Orders

1X Technologies opened pre-orders for NEO, its home humanoid robot designed for everyday consumer use. Unlike industrial humanoids targeting factories, NEO is built for home environments — doing chores, assisting elderly residents, and learning household routines. Priced to reach mass market, NEO's launch represented the first serious attempt to bring a bipedal AI robot into the consumer home market.



1X Technologies 开放 NEO 预购——面向家庭环境的消费级人形机器人。不同于瞄准工厂的工业机器人，NEO 做家务、辅助老人、学习家庭日常。定价面向大众市场。这是首次有公司认真尝试把双足 AI 机器人带进普通家庭。

Crypto×AICrypto×AI Oct 1

Virtuals Protocol Integrates Coinbase x402 Payment StandardVirtuals Protocol 集成 Coinbase x402 Payment Standard

Virtuals Protocol integrated Coinbase's x402 micropayment protocol, enabling AI agents on the Virtuals platform to autonomously pay for services and receive payments without human intervention. The x402 standard (inspired by HTTP 402 "Payment Required") allows AI agents to transact natively on Base L2, creating the foundation for a machine-to-machine economy where AI agents can independently monetize their actions.



Virtuals Protocol 集成 Coinbase 的 x402 微支付协议，让平台上的 AI 代理无需人工干预即可自主收付款。x402 标准（灵感来自 HTTP 402「需要付款」）让 AI 代理在 Base L2 上原生交易，为机器对机器经济奠定基础——AI 代理可以独立变现自己的行为。
Virtuals Protocol 集成 Coinbase 的 x402 微支付协议，让平台上的 AI 代理无需人工干预即可自主收付款。x402 标准（灵感来自 HTTP 402「需要付款」）让 AI 代理在 Base L2 上原生交易，为机器对机器经济奠定基础——AI 代理可以独立变现自己的行为。
Source: Virtuals ↗来源: Virtuals ↗
Sep
Products产品 Sep 30 ★

OpenAI Launches Sora 2OpenAI 发布 Sora 2

OpenAI released Sora 2 on September 30, 2025, a major upgrade to its video generation model featuring more physically accurate and realistic output, synchronized dialogue, and coherent sound effects. Sora 2 introduced a companion iOS app and significantly improved controllability over camera movements and scene composition. The model showed dramatic improvements in maintaining temporal consistency and generating complex multi-character interactions. Alongside the model launch, OpenAI introduced storyboard features allowing frame-by-frame creative control over generated videos.



OpenAI 发布 Sora 2，视频生成模型大升级——物理效果更真实、支持同步对话和连贯音效。推出 iOS 伴侣应用，镜头运动和场景构图的可控性大幅提升。时间一致性和多角色复杂交互均有显著改进。还推出分镜功能，支持逐帧创意控制。
OpenAI 发布 Sora 2，视频生成模型大升级——物理效果更真实、支持同步对话和连贯音效。推出 iOS 伴侣应用，镜头运动和场景构图的可控性大幅提升。时间一致性和多角色复杂交互均有显著改进。还推出分镜功能，支持逐帧创意控制。

Figure 02 Humanoid Robot Mass ProductionFigure 02 人形机器人 量产

Figure AI begins mass production of Figure 02 humanoid robots for BMW manufacturing facilities.

So what? Physical AI goes from demo to deployment. The labor market disruption timeline just accelerated. Robotics + AI = the next trillion-dollar intersection.



Figure AI 开始量产 Figure 02 人形机器人，供应 BMW 制造工厂。物理 AI 从演示走向部署，劳动力市场颠覆的时间线加速。机器人 + AI = 下一个万亿美元交汇点。

Products产品 Sep 1

Doubao Becomes China's #1 AI App — 155M Weekly Active UsersDoubao 成为 China's #1 AI App — 155M Weekly Active Users

ByteDance's Doubao surpasses all competitors to become China's most-used AI chatbot, reaching 155 million weekly active users according to QuestMobile data from late 2025 — while Volcano Engine, ByteDance's enterprise tech arm, targets RMB 25B+ revenue in 2025.

So what? ByteDance already cracked distribution once with TikTok/Douyin. Applying the same playbook to AI — deep TikTok-native integration, aggressive monetization through Volcano Engine, and relentless product iteration — works. Doubao's user lead reflects ByteDance's systemic advantage: it doesn't just have an AI product, it has China's largest content distribution network.



字节跳动的豆包超越所有竞品，成为中国使用最多的 AI 聊天机器人，周活达 1.55 亿。火山引擎 2025 年目标营收 ¥250 亿+。字节用 TikTok/抖音的分发套路做 AI 同样奏效——深度抖音原生集成、激进的火山引擎变现、和不停的产品迭代。豆包的用户领先反映了字节的系统性优势：它不只有 AI 产品，还有中国最大的内容分发网络。
字节跳动的豆包超越所有竞品，成为中国使用最多的 AI 聊天机器人，周活达 1.55 亿。火山引擎 2025 年目标营收 ¥250 亿+。字节用 TikTok/抖音的分发套路做 AI 同样奏效——深度抖音原生集成、激进的火山引擎变现、和不停的产品迭代。豆包的用户领先反映了字节的系统性优势：它不只有 AI 产品，还有中国最大的内容分发网络。

OpenAI Agents SDK Goes GAOpenAI Agents SDK 正式发布

OpenAI's Agents SDK reaches general availability, enabling developers to build production-grade AI agents with tool use, handoffs, and guardrails.

So what? The agent framework wars heat up. OpenAI, Anthropic, LangChain all competing — whoever wins the developer platform wins the next decade.

Jul
Industry行业 Jul 18 ★

GENIUS Act Signed: US Federal Stablecoin Framework EnactedGENIUS 法案签署：美国联邦稳定币框架落地

President Trump signed the GENIUS Act (Guiding and Establishing National Innovation for US Stablecoins Act) into law, creating the first comprehensive federal regulatory framework for US dollar-pegged stablecoins. The law established licensing requirements, reserve standards, and consumer protections — a landmark step in integrating digital assets into the mainstream financial system and directly relevant to AI payment infrastructure.



Trump 总统签署 GENIUS Act，建立美国首个全面的联邦稳定币监管框架。该法律制定了牌照要求、储备标准和消费者保护——将数字资产纳入主流金融体系的里程碑，也与 AI 支付基础设施直接相关。
Trump 总统签署 GENIUS Act，建立美国首个全面的联邦稳定币监管框架。该法律制定了牌照要求、储备标准和消费者保护——将数字资产纳入主流金融体系的里程碑，也与 AI 支付基础设施直接相关。
Source: White House ↗来源: White House ↗
Models模型 Jul 18 ★

GPT-5 ReleasedGPT-5 发布

OpenAI launches GPT-5, unifying the o-series reasoning with GPT fluency into a single model with native tool use and image generation.

So what? The convergence model — reasoning + creativity + tools in one. OpenAI reclaims the throne, at least temporarily. The bar keeps rising.



OpenAI 上线 GPT-5，将 o 系列推理能力与 GPT 的流畅性统一到单一模型中，原生支持工具调用和图像生成。融合模型——推理 + 创造力 + 工具合为一体。OpenAI 至少暂时夺回王座。标杆持续攀升。
OpenAI 上线 GPT-5，将 o 系列推理能力与 GPT 的流畅性统一到单一模型中，原生支持工具调用和图像生成。融合模型——推理 + 创造力 + 工具合为一体。OpenAI 至少暂时夺回王座。标杆持续攀升。

Products产品 Jul 17 ★

OpenAI Launches ChatGPT Agent ModeOpenAI 发布 ChatGPT Agent Mode

OpenAI launched ChatGPT agent mode on July 17, 2025, integrating Operator's web browsing and computer-use capabilities directly into ChatGPT for Pro, Plus, and Team subscribers. ChatGPT can now proactively choose from a toolbox of agentic skills — browsing the web, running code, managing files — to complete complex multi-step tasks autonomously. The release effectively retired Operator as a standalone product, folding its capabilities into the main ChatGPT interface. This marked OpenAI's decisive move to transform ChatGPT from a chatbot into a fully capable autonomous AI agent.



OpenAI 上线 ChatGPT 代理模式，将 Operator 的网页浏览和电脑操控能力直接集成到 ChatGPT 中。ChatGPT 现在能主动从工具箱中选择技能——浏览网页、跑代码、管理文件——自主完成复杂多步任务。Operator 作为独立产品退役，能力并入 ChatGPT 主界面。OpenAI 将 ChatGPT 从聊天机器人转变为全能 AI 代理的决定性一步。
OpenAI 上线 ChatGPT 代理模式，将 Operator 的网页浏览和电脑操控能力直接集成到 ChatGPT 中。ChatGPT 现在能主动从工具箱中选择技能——浏览网页、跑代码、管理文件——自主完成复杂多步任务。Operator 作为独立产品退役，能力并入 ChatGPT 主界面。OpenAI 将 ChatGPT 从聊天机器人转变为全能 AI 代理的决定性一步。
Source: OpenAI ↗来源: OpenAI ↗
Models模型 Jul 14 ★

Kimi K2 — Trillion-Parameter Open-Weight Frontier ModelKimi K2 — 万亿参数开源前沿模型

Moonshot AI releases Kimi K2, a 1 trillion parameter open-weight MoE model — one of the largest openly available models in existence. Achieves strong agentic task completion and tool-use benchmarks.

So what? Trillion-parameter open-weight models were once thought impossible outside of hyperscaler infrastructure. Kimi K2 rewrote that assumption. For the open-source community, it's the equivalent of Meta's Llama 3.1 405B moment — but orders of magnitude larger. Any researcher or startup can now run trillion-parameter intelligence locally or on cheap cloud infra.



月之暗面发布 Kimi K2，1 万亿参数开源 MoE 模型——现有最大的开放模型之一。代理任务和工具调用基准表现强势。万亿参数开源模型曾被认为在超大规模基础设施之外不可能实现。Kimi K2 改写了这个假设。
月之暗面发布 Kimi K2，1 万亿参数开源 MoE 模型——现有最大的开放模型之一。代理任务和工具调用基准表现强势。万亿参数开源模型曾被认为在超大规模基础设施之外不可能实现。Kimi K2 改写了这个假设。

World (Worldcoin) Launches World ID 2.0World (Worldcoin) 发布 World ID 2.0

World (formerly Worldcoin) launches World ID 2.0 with verified human credentials, expanding to 50+ countries.

So what? Proof of humanity becomes critical as AI-generated content floods the internet. Crypto's answer to the deepfake problem — the intersection thesis plays out.



World（原 Worldcoin）上线 World ID 2.0，验证人类身份凭证，扩展至 50+ 个国家。AI 生成内容泛滥的时代，人类身份证明变得至关重要。Crypto 给深度伪造问题的答案——交叉主题论点在兑现。

Models模型 Jun 24 ★

Anthropic Releases Claude Opus 4.5 with Hybrid ReasoningAnthropic 发布 Claude Opus 4.5 with Hybrid Reasoning

Anthropic released Claude Opus 4.5, introducing hybrid reasoning — the ability to seamlessly switch between fast response mode and extended thinking mode within the same context. This allowed the model to reason deeply on complex problems without requiring separate "thinking" prompts. Claude Opus 4.5 achieved state-of-the-art scores on graduate-level reasoning benchmarks and demonstrated significant improvements in multi-step agentic tasks. The hybrid reasoning architecture became a new paradigm for frontier AI model design.



Anthropic 发布 Claude Opus 4.5，引入混合推理——在同一上下文中无缝切换快速响应和扩展思考模式。不需要单独的「思考」提示就能深度推理复杂问题。在研究生级推理基准上达到最优，多步代理任务显著提升。混合推理架构成为前沿 AI 模型设计的新范式。
Anthropic 发布 Claude Opus 4.5，引入混合推理——在同一上下文中无缝切换快速响应和扩展思考模式。不需要单独的「思考」提示就能深度推理复杂问题。在研究生级推理基准上达到最优，多步代理任务显著提升。混合推理架构成为前沿 AI 模型设计的新范式。

Anthropic releases Claude 4 Opus, their most capable model, excelling at creative writing, complex analysis, and multi-step reasoning.

So what? Opus 4 is the first model that genuinely feels like a peer, not a tool. The ceiling for AI-human collaboration just got much higher.



Anthropic 发布 Claude 4 Opus，最强模型，在创意写作、复杂分析和多步推理上表现卓越。Opus 4 是第一个让人感觉像同伴而非工具的模型。AI 与人协作的天花板又高了一大截。

Robotics机器人 Jun 1 ★

Tesla Optimus Robots Begin Internal Factory Deployment特斯拉 Optimus Robots Begin Internal Factory Deployment

Tesla began deploying Optimus humanoid robots internally across its manufacturing facilities for autonomous factory work. With thousands of units in Fremont's pilot production line and Elon Musk projecting 1 million Optimus units per year at full scale, this marked the first time a major automaker deployed general-purpose humanoid robots for real production tasks. Tesla simultaneously announced Gen 3 design improvements and aggressive 2025-2026 production targets.



Tesla 开始在自家工厂内部部署 Optimus 人形机器人执行自主生产任务。Fremont 试产线上数千台，Elon Musk 预计全面量产后年产百万台 Optimus。这是首次有大型车企将通用人形机器人投入真实生产任务。同时公布 Gen 3 设计改进和激进的 2025-2026 生产目标。

Microsoft Build 2025 — The Agentic Web Declared Open微软 Build 2025 — The Agentic Web Declared Open

At Build 2025, Microsoft announces AI agents across Windows, GitHub, Azure, and Microsoft 365 — positioning the company around an "Agentic Web" where AI operates autonomously across enterprise workflows. GitHub Copilot crosses 180 million developer users.

So what? Microsoft is translating its OpenAI partnership into systemic OS-level advantage. When Copilot is in your IDE, your email, your browser, and your cloud — you don't switch tools, you switch modes. The enterprise lock-in flywheel is spinning at full speed.



Build 2025 上，Microsoft 宣布 AI 代理覆盖 Windows、GitHub、Azure 和 Microsoft 365，围绕「Agentic Web」定位——AI 在企业工作流中自主运作。GitHub Copilot 突破 1.8 亿开发者用户。Microsoft 把 OpenAI 合作关系转化为系统级操作系统优势。当 Copilot 在你的 IDE、邮箱、浏览器和云里时——企业锁定飞轮全速运转。

Industry行业 May 1

EU AI Act Takes EffectEU AI Act 正式生效

The EU AI Act's first obligations take effect, requiring transparency for AI systems and banning certain high-risk applications.

So what? Regulatory fragmentation begins — EU goes strict, US goes light. Companies need two playbooks. Compliance becomes a competitive advantage for some, a moat for others.



欧盟 AI 法案首批义务生效，要求 AI 系统透明化并禁止特定高风险应用。监管碎片化开始——欧盟从严，美国从松。企业需要两套策略。合规成为某些公司的竞争优势，也成为另一些公司的护城河。
欧盟 AI 法案首批义务生效，要求 AI 系统透明化并禁止特定高风险应用。监管碎片化开始——欧盟从严，美国从松。企业需要两套策略。合规成为某些公司的竞争优势，也成为另一些公司的护城河。

Apr
Models模型 Apr 30

Xiaomi Launches MiMo — Smartphone Giant Enters Open LLM Race小米 发布 MiMo — Smartphone Giant 进入 Open LLM Race

Xiaomi releases MiMo-7B, its first open-source reasoning model, which surpasses OpenAI o1-mini and QwQ-32B-Preview on AIME 2024-2025 and LiveCodeBench v5 — at 7B parameters.

So what? When a hardware company best known for affordable smartphones ships a best-in-class reasoning model, it signals AI has become table stakes for any serious tech player. Xiaomi's entry broadens China's AI competition beyond pure-play AI startups. With RMB 200B ($27.8B) in 5-year R&D commitments, hardware companies are becoming AI companies.



小米开源 MiMo-7B，首款推理模型，在 AIME 2024-2025 和 LiveCodeBench v5 上超越 OpenAI o1-mini 和 QwQ-32B-Preview——只有 7B 参数。当一家以平价手机著称的硬件公司能造出顶级推理模型，说明 AI 已成为所有严肃科技玩家的标配。小米的入局让中国 AI 竞争从纯 AI 创业公司扩展到全行业。
小米开源 MiMo-7B，首款推理模型，在 AIME 2024-2025 和 LiveCodeBench v5 上超越 OpenAI o1-mini 和 QwQ-32B-Preview——只有 7B 参数。当一家以平价手机著称的硬件公司能造出顶级推理模型，说明 AI 已成为所有严肃科技玩家的标配。小米的入局让中国 AI 竞争从纯 AI 创业公司扩展到全行业。
Source: Xiaomi GitHub ↗来源: Xiaomi GitHub ↗
Models模型 Apr 16 ★

OpenAI Releases o3 and o4-mini with Full Tool UseOpenAI 发布 o3 and o4-mini with Full Tool Use

OpenAI released o3 and o4-mini on April 16, 2025, the first reasoning models with full tool access — including web browsing, Python execution, image generation, and file analysis — natively built in. o3 became OpenAI's most capable reasoning model, while o4-mini offered a strong balance of speed and performance at lower cost. Both models could "think with images" by cropping and zooming into uploaded visuals during their reasoning process. The launch represented a fundamental convergence of reasoning and tool-use capabilities in a single model.



OpenAI 发布 o3 和 o4-mini，首批原生支持全工具访问的推理模型——网页浏览、Python 执行、图像生成和文件分析全部内置。o3 是 OpenAI 最强推理模型，o4-mini 在速度和性能之间取得平衡。两者都能在推理过程中「用图像思考」——裁剪和放大上传的图片。推理与工具调用在单一模型中根本性融合。
OpenAI 发布 o3 和 o4-mini，首批原生支持全工具访问的推理模型——网页浏览、Python 执行、图像生成和文件分析全部内置。o3 是 OpenAI 最强推理模型，o4-mini 在速度和性能之间取得平衡。两者都能在推理过程中「用图像思考」——裁剪和放大上传的图片。推理与工具调用在单一模型中根本性融合。
Source: OpenAI ↗来源: OpenAI ↗
Models模型 Apr 15

Deepgram Aura-2 — Enterprise-Grade Real-Time TTSDeepgram Aura-2 — 企业级实时语音合成

Deepgram launches Aura-2, its enterprise text-to-speech model designed for real-time voice AI applications, with human-like expressiveness and ultra-low latency for production voice agents.

So what? With Nova-2 for STT and Aura-2 for TTS, Deepgram now offers a complete voice AI stack under one API. End-to-end speech-to-speech inference without stitching together multiple vendors means fewer points of failure, lower latency, and better cost economics. Voice AI agents went from prototype to production-ready.



Deepgram 上线 Aura-2，企业级文本转语音模型，为实时语音 AI 应用设计，拟人表达力强、延迟超低。Nova-2 做 STT、Aura-2 做 TTS——Deepgram 在单一 API 下提供完整语音 AI 技术栈。端到端语音推理无需拼接多个供应商。语音 AI 代理从原型走向生产就绪。
Deepgram 上线 Aura-2，企业级文本转语音模型，为实时语音 AI 应用设计，拟人表达力强、延迟超低。Nova-2 做 STT、Aura-2 做 TTS——Deepgram 在单一 API 下提供完整语音 AI 技术栈。端到端语音推理无需拼接多个供应商。语音 AI 代理从原型走向生产就绪。

Models模型 Apr 14 ★

OpenAI Releases GPT-4.1 in the APIOpenAI 发布 GPT-4.1 in the API

OpenAI released GPT-4.1 on April 14, 2025, a new model family in the API optimized for coding, instruction following, and long-context tasks with a 1 million token context window. GPT-4.1 outperformed GPT-4.5 Preview on many key benchmarks while being significantly cheaper and faster, leading to the deprecation of GPT-4.5 Preview. It came in three sizes — GPT-4.1, GPT-4.1 mini, and GPT-4.1 nano — serving different cost-performance tradeoffs. GPT-4.1 quickly became the default model for developers building production applications on the OpenAI API.



OpenAI 发布 GPT-4.1，API 专用模型家族，针对编程、指令执行和长上下文任务优化，100 万 token 上下文窗口。GPT-4.1 在多项关键基准上超越 GPT-4.5 Preview，同时更便宜更快，导致 GPT-4.5 Preview 被弃用。三个版本——GPT-4.1、mini 和 nano——覆盖不同性价比需求。迅速成为开发者构建生产应用的默认选择。
OpenAI 发布 GPT-4.1，API 专用模型家族，针对编程、指令执行和长上下文任务优化，100 万 token 上下文窗口。GPT-4.1 在多项关键基准上超越 GPT-4.5 Preview，同时更便宜更快，导致 GPT-4.5 Preview 被弃用。三个版本——GPT-4.1、mini 和 nano——覆盖不同性价比需求。迅速成为开发者构建生产应用的默认选择。
Source: OpenAI ↗来源: OpenAI ↗
Funding融资 Apr 7

OpenAI Raises $40B at $300B ValuationOpenAI 融资 $40B at $300B Valuation

OpenAI closes a $40B funding round led by SoftBank, valuing the company at $300B — the largest private tech raise ever.

So what? The AI arms race has a price tag: $300B. This is either justified by AGI potential or the biggest bubble in tech history. I lean toward the former.



OpenAI 完成 $40B 融资，SoftBank 领投，估值 $300B——史上最大私有科技融资。AI 军备竞赛的标价：$300B。这要么被 AGI 潜力证明合理，要么是科技史上最大泡沫。我倾向前者。

Models模型 Apr 5 ★

Meta Llama 4 — Natively Multimodal MoE Open FrontierMeta Llama 4 — 原生多模态 MoE 开源前沿模型

Meta releases Llama 4 Scout (17B active / 109B total MoE) and Maverick, both natively multimodal. Also previews Llama 4 Behemoth — a teacher model claimed to outperform GPT-4.5 on STEM benchmarks.

So what? Meta bets on MoE + multimodal from day one instead of retrofitting vision into text-only models. With Scout deployable on a single H100 GPU, open-source closes the gap further. The Behemoth preview signals Meta's intent to compete at the very top — and give away the fruits publicly.



Meta 发布 Llama 4 Scout（17B 激活 / 109B 总参数 MoE）和 Maverick，均为原生多模态。还预告了 Llama 4 Behemoth——一个在 STEM 基准上声称超越 GPT-4.5 的教师模型。Meta 从第一天就押注 MoE + 多模态，而不是往纯文本模型上硬加视觉。Scout 单卡 H100 就能跑，开源继续拉近差距。

Google launches Gemini 2.5 Pro with native thinking capabilities, 1M token context, and top-tier coding performance.

Products产品 Mar 25 ★

OpenAI Introduces 4o Image GenerationOpenAI 推出 4o Image Generation

OpenAI released native image generation capabilities within GPT-4o on March 25, 2025, enabling the model to generate and edit images directly in conversation without switching to a separate system. Unlike DALL-E 3, the 4o image generation is tightly integrated with the model's reasoning, allowing it to understand context, follow complex instructions, and use uploaded images as references. The feature went viral immediately for its ability to generate Studio Ghibli-style artwork and create coherent multi-panel scenes. It marked OpenAI's first truly multimodal generation model where vision understanding and image creation are unified.



OpenAI 为 GPT-4o 加入原生图像生成能力，在对话中直接生成和编辑图片，不用切换到单独系统。跟 DALL-E 3 不同，4o 图像生成与模型推理深度集成，能理解上下文、执行复杂指令、参考上传图片。Studio Ghibli 风格作品刷屏走红。这是 OpenAI 首个真正的多模态生成模型——视觉理解和图像创作合为一体。
OpenAI 为 GPT-4o 加入原生图像生成能力，在对话中直接生成和编辑图片，不用切换到单独系统。跟 DALL-E 3 不同，4o 图像生成与模型推理深度集成，能理解上下文、执行复杂指令、参考上传图片。Studio Ghibli 风格作品刷屏走红。这是 OpenAI 首个真正的多模态生成模型——视觉理解和图像创作合为一体。

Products产品 Mar 18 ★

NVIDIA GTC 2025: Blackwell Ultra and Vera Rubin Architecture英伟达 GTC 2025: Blackwell Ultra and Vera Rubin Architecture

At GTC 2025, Jensen Huang unveiled NVIDIA's next two GPU generations: Blackwell Ultra, an enhanced version of the Blackwell architecture with improved memory and compute for AI training workloads; and Vera Rubin, the follow-on architecture combining the Vera CPU with the Rubin GPU for a new era of AI supercomputing. NVIDIA also expanded its NIM microservices ecosystem and announced new Cosmos robotics simulation capabilities. The keynote solidified NVIDIA's roadmap dominance in the AI accelerator market for the coming years.



GTC 2025 上，Jensen Huang 公布 NVIDIA 下两代 GPU 架构：Blackwell Ultra（增强版 Blackwell，更强的内存和算力）和 Vera Rubin（Vera CPU + Rubin GPU，开启 AI 超算新时代）。同时扩展 NIM 微服务生态和 Cosmos 机器人仿真能力。NVIDIA 的路线图统治力持续巩固。
GTC 2025 上，Jensen Huang 公布 NVIDIA 下两代 GPU 架构：Blackwell Ultra（增强版 Blackwell，更强的内存和算力）和 Vera Rubin（Vera CPU + Rubin GPU，开启 AI 超算新时代）。同时扩展 NIM 微服务生态和 Cosmos 机器人仿真能力。NVIDIA 的路线图统治力持续巩固。

Models模型 Mar 16

Baidu Launches ERNIE 4.5 + X1 Reasoning Model, Makes ERNIE Bot Free百度 发布 ERNIE 4.5 + X1 推理模型, Makes ERNIE Bot Free

Baidu launches ERNIE 4.5 (native multimodal, starting at RMB 0.004 per 1K tokens) and ERNIE X1 (deep-thinking reasoning model) — while simultaneously making ERNIE Bot free for consumers.

So what? DeepSeek's low-cost shock forced every Chinese AI lab to reprice. Baidu's response was dual: a cheaper multimodal frontier model AND a reasoning model to match the o1/R1 wave. Going free on the consumer app is the right strategic move — ERNIE needs users to stay relevant in China's AI chatbot wars, where Doubao and Kimi are both growing fast.



百度上线 ERNIE 4.5（原生多模态，起价 ¥0.004/千 token）和 ERNIE X1（深度思考推理模型），同时让文心一言消费端免费。DeepSeek 的低价冲击迫使所有中国 AI 实验室重新定价。百度的应对：更便宜的多模态前沿模型加推理模型。消费端免费是正确的战略——ERNIE 需要用户才能在豆包和 Kimi 快速增长的中国 AI 聊天机器人大战中保持相关性。
百度上线 ERNIE 4.5（原生多模态，起价 ¥0.004/千 token）和 ERNIE X1（深度思考推理模型），同时让文心一言消费端免费。DeepSeek 的低价冲击迫使所有中国 AI 实验室重新定价。百度的应对：更便宜的多模态前沿模型加推理模型。消费端免费是正确的战略——ERNIE 需要用户才能在豆包和 Kimi 快速增长的中国 AI 聊天机器人大战中保持相关性。
Source: PR Newswire / Baidu ↗来源: PR Newswire / Baidu ↗
Robotics机器人 Mar 12 ★

Google DeepMind Launches Gemini RoboticsGoogle DeepMind 发布 Gemini Robotics

Google DeepMind announced Gemini Robotics and Gemini Robotics-ER on March 12, 2025, vision-language-action (VLA) models built on Gemini 2.0 designed to give robots the ability to understand, reason about, and act in the physical world. Gemini Robotics can follow open-ended natural language instructions to perform complex manipulation tasks, while the ER (Embodied Reasoning) variant enables deeper spatial and physical understanding. The models demonstrated generalization across diverse robot morphologies and tasks without task-specific retraining. This marked Google DeepMind's first major foray into general-purpose robotics foundation models competitive with Physical Intelligence and Tesla Optimus.



Google DeepMind 发布 Gemini Robotics 和 Gemini Robotics-ER，基于 Gemini 2.0 的视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型，让机器人能理解、推理并在物理世界中行动。Gemini Robotics 可以遵循开放式自然语言指令执行复杂操作任务，ER 版本具备更深的空间和物理理解能力。无需针对特定任务重新训练即可泛化到不同机器人形态。这是 Google DeepMind 在通用机器人基础模型领域的首次重大布局。
Google DeepMind 发布 Gemini Robotics 和 Gemini Robotics-ER，基于 Gemini 2.0 的视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型，让机器人能理解、推理并在物理世界中行动。Gemini Robotics 可以遵循开放式自然语言指令执行复杂操作任务，ER 版本具备更深的空间和物理理解能力。无需针对特定任务重新训练即可泛化到不同机器人形态。这是 Google DeepMind 在通用机器人基础模型领域的首次重大布局。

Claude 3.7 Sonnet with Extended ThinkingClaude 3.7 Sonnet 搭载扩展思考

Anthropic releases Claude 3.7 Sonnet — a hybrid model that can toggle between fast responses and deep reasoning with extended thinking.

So what? Best of both worlds: quick chat when you need it, deep analysis when you don't. The UX of reasoning models just got much better.



Anthropic 发布 Claude 3.7 Sonnet——混合模型，可以在快速响应和深度推理的扩展思考之间切换。两全其美：需要快聊就快聊，需要深度分析就深度分析。推理模型的用户体验大幅改善。

Models模型 Feb 17 ★

xAI Releases Grok-3 — Trained on Colossus SuperclusterxAI 发布 Grok-3 — Trained on Colossus Supercluster

xAI released Grok-3 on February 17, 2025, trained on the 100,000-GPU Colossus supercluster with approximately 10x the computational resources of prior models. Grok-3 introduced "Think" mode, a chain-of-thought reasoning capability for complex problems, and "DeepSearch" for comprehensive research tasks. Benchmark results showed it competitive with or surpassing GPT-4.5 and Claude 3.7 Sonnet on math, science, and coding tasks. A premium SuperGrok subscription tier was introduced to access Grok-3's advanced features, with the model briefly made available to free X users as well.



xAI 发布 Grok-3，在 10 万块 GPU 的 Colossus 超算集群上训练，算力约为前代 10 倍。新增「Think」思维链推理模式和「DeepSearch」深度研究功能。基准结果显示与 GPT-4.5 和 Claude 3.7 Sonnet 竞争甚至超越。推出 SuperGrok 高级订阅。
xAI 发布 Grok-3，在 10 万块 GPU 的 Colossus 超算集群上训练，算力约为前代 10 倍。新增「Think」思维链推理模式和「DeepSearch」深度研究功能。基准结果显示与 GPT-4.5 和 Claude 3.7 Sonnet 竞争甚至超越。推出 SuperGrok 高级订阅。

Models模型 Jan 31

OpenAI Releases o3-miniOpenAI 发布 o3-mini

OpenAI released o3-mini, a cost-efficient reasoning model delivering strong performance on STEM tasks including math, science, and coding at a fraction of the compute cost of o3. The model offered three reasoning effort levels — low, medium, and high — letting developers balance speed and accuracy. o3-mini outperformed o1 on many STEM benchmarks while being significantly cheaper, making advanced reasoning accessible to a much broader set of developers and applications.



OpenAI 发布 o3-mini，高性价比推理模型，在 STEM 任务上表现强劲，算力消耗远低于 o3。提供低/中/高三档推理力度，让开发者灵活平衡速度和准确性。o3-mini 在多项 STEM 基准上超越 o1，成本大幅降低，让高级推理触达更广泛的开发者和应用。

Crypto×AICrypto×AI Jan 29

ai16z Officially Rebrands to ElizaOS After a16z Requestai16z Officially 更名 to ElizaOS After a16z Request

ai16z officially rebranded to ElizaOS after the real a16z (Andreessen Horowitz) requested the name change due to brand confusion. The project simultaneously announced plans to build its own L1 blockchain optimized for AI agents. The rebranding crystallized the project's identity around its open-source agent framework, which had by this point powered thousands of AI agent deployments across crypto.



ai16z 正式改名 ElizaOS——真正的 a16z（Andreessen Horowitz）因品牌混淆要求更名。项目同时宣布计划构建面向 AI 代理优化的 L1 区块链。更名让项目身份聚焦于其开源代理框架，该框架已驱动数千个 AI 代理部署。
ai16z 正式改名 ElizaOS——真正的 a16z（Andreessen Horowitz）因品牌混淆要求更名。项目同时宣布计划构建面向 AI 代理优化的 L1 区块链。更名让项目身份聚焦于其开源代理框架，该框架已驱动数千个 AI 代理部署。
Source: Decrypt ↗来源: Decrypt ↗
Funding融资 Jan 27 ★

DeepSeek Triggers $1T Tech SelloffDeepSeek 引发 $1T Tech Selloff

DeepSeek R1's efficiency claims trigger a massive tech selloff — NVIDIA drops 17% in a single day, erasing nearly $600B in market cap.

So what? The "more compute = better AI" thesis gets challenged. If you can train frontier models for 1/10th the cost, the entire AI investment thesis needs re-pricing.



DeepSeek R1 的效率声明引发科技股大抛售——NVIDIA 单日跌 17%，市值蒸发近 $600B。「更多算力 = 更好 AI」的论点遭到挑战。如果前沿模型训练成本降到十分之一，整个 AI 投资逻辑都得重新定价。
DeepSeek R1 的效率声明引发科技股大抛售——NVIDIA 单日跌 17%，市值蒸发近 $600B。「更多算力 = 更好 AI」的论点遭到挑战。如果前沿模型训练成本降到十分之一，整个 AI 投资逻辑都得重新定价。
Source: Reuters ↗来源: Reuters ↗
Crypto×AICrypto×AI Jan 25

Virtuals Protocol Expands to Solana — Multi-Chain AI Agent PlatformVirtuals Protocol 扩展 to Solana — Multi-Chain AI Agent Platform

Virtuals Protocol announced expansion to Solana, establishing the platform across both Base (Ethereum L2) and Solana ecosystems. The launch included a Meteora liquidity pool, a Strategic SOL Reserve (1% of trading fees converted to SOL), and new builder grants. Previously a Base-only AI agent launchpad that had reached $1B+ TVL, Virtuals' multi-chain expansion signaled the mainstreaming of AI agent tokens.



Virtuals Protocol 宣布扩展到 Solana，横跨 Base 和 Solana 双生态。上线 Meteora 流动性池，设立战略 SOL 储备（交易费 1% 转换为 SOL），并推出新的 builder 补助。之前仅在 Base 上运营、TVL 超 $1B 的 Virtuals 多链扩张标志着 AI 代理代币走向主流。
Virtuals Protocol 宣布扩展到 Solana，横跨 Base 和 Solana 双生态。上线 Meteora 流动性池，设立战略 SOL 储备（交易费 1% 转换为 SOL），并推出新的 builder 补助。之前仅在 Base 上运营、TVL 超 $1B 的 Virtuals 多链扩张标志着 AI 代理代币走向主流。
Source: Virtuals Protocol ↗来源: Virtuals Protocol ↗
Products产品 Jan 23 ★

OpenAI Launches Operator — Web-Browsing AI AgentOpenAI 发布 Operator — Web-Browsing AI Agent

OpenAI launched Operator on January 23, 2025, a research preview of an AI agent that can browse the web and complete tasks autonomously using its own browser. Powered by the Computer-Using Agent (CUA) model, Operator can fill forms, place orders, and navigate websites without human hand-holding. It was initially available only to ChatGPT Pro users in the US, with a broader rollout planned later. Operator was later fully integrated into ChatGPT in July 2025 as "ChatGPT agent mode," signaling OpenAI's strategic shift toward agentic AI.



OpenAI 上线 Operator，AI 代理可以用自己的浏览器自主浏览网页并完成任务。跑 Computer-Using Agent (CUA) 模型，能填表单、下订单、导航网站。先向美国 ChatGPT Pro 用户开放。后来在 2025 年 7 月完全并入 ChatGPT，成为「ChatGPT 代理模式」。
OpenAI 上线 Operator，AI 代理可以用自己的浏览器自主浏览网页并完成任务。跑 Computer-Using Agent (CUA) 模型，能填表单、下订单、导航网站。先向美国 ChatGPT Pro 用户开放。后来在 2025 年 7 月完全并入 ChatGPT，成为「ChatGPT 代理模式」。
Source: OpenAI ↗来源: OpenAI ↗
Models模型 Jan 20 ★

DeepSeek R1 Open-Source Reasoning ModelDeepSeek R1 开源 推理模型

Chinese lab DeepSeek releases R1, an open-source reasoning model rivaling OpenAI o1 at a fraction of the training cost.

So what? The "China can't compete" narrative dies. Open-source reasoning at 1/10th the cost changes the economics of AI. Every startup just got a gift.



中国实验室 DeepSeek 开源 R1，推理模型媲美 OpenAI o1，训练成本只是零头。「中国做不了」的叙事就此终结。十分之一成本的开源推理改写了 AI 经济学，每个创业公司都收到了一份大礼。
中国实验室 DeepSeek 开源 R1，推理模型媲美 OpenAI o1，训练成本只是零头。「中国做不了」的叙事就此终结。十分之一成本的开源推理改写了 AI 经济学，每个创业公司都收到了一份大礼。

Models模型 Jan 20 ★

Kimi K1.5 — China's First Reasoning Model to Match OpenAI o1Kimi K1.5 — China's First 推理模型 to Match OpenAI o1

Moonshot AI releases Kimi K1.5, a reasoning-focused model that matches OpenAI o1 on mathematics, coding, and multimodal reasoning benchmarks — delivered just days before DeepSeek-R1 made global headlines.

So what? The week of January 20, 2025 became a proof point that China's AI labs weren't trailing by months — they were parallel. Kimi K1.5 and DeepSeek-R1 arriving simultaneously shattered the narrative that advanced reasoning models required trillion-dollar infrastructure. The reasoning capabilities race went fully global.



月之暗面发布 Kimi K1.5，推理模型在数学、编程和多模态推理基准上追平 OpenAI o1——比 DeepSeek-R1 全球刷屏只早了几天。2025 年 1 月 20 日这周证明中国 AI 实验室不是落后几个月——而是齐头并进。Kimi K1.5 和 DeepSeek-R1 同时到来，打破了「高级推理模型需要万亿美元基础设施」的叙事。
月之暗面发布 Kimi K1.5，推理模型在数学、编程和多模态推理基准上追平 OpenAI o1——比 DeepSeek-R1 全球刷屏只早了几天。2025 年 1 月 20 日这周证明中国 AI 实验室不是落后几个月——而是齐头并进。Kimi K1.5 和 DeepSeek-R1 同时到来，打破了「高级推理模型需要万亿美元基础设施」的叙事。

Models模型 Jan 15 ★

MiniMax-01 Open Source — 1M Token Context Hybrid MoEMiniMax-01 开源 — 1M Token Context Hybrid MoE

MiniMax open-sources MiniMax-01, a hybrid Mixture-of-Experts model with 1 million token context window, trained with custom reinforcement learning (CISPO). Trained at a fraction of typical frontier costs.

So what? MiniMax didn't just match DeepSeek on cost efficiency — they open-sourced a 1M context model when GPT-4 was limited to 128K. For any application needing full-book or full-codebase context, this was a paradigm shift. Chinese labs were no longer followers; they were setting the bar on long-context architecture.



MiniMax 开源 MiniMax-01，混合 MoE 模型，100 万 token 上下文窗口，用自研强化学习（CISPO）训练，成本远低于前沿水平。当 GPT-4 还限在 128K 时，中国实验室开源了 100 万上下文模型。中国 AI 不再是跟随者——他们在定义长上下文架构的标杆。
MiniMax 开源 MiniMax-01，混合 MoE 模型，100 万 token 上下文窗口，用自研强化学习（CISPO）训练，成本远低于前沿水平。当 GPT-4 还限在 128K 时，中国实验室开源了 100 万上下文模型。中国 AI 不再是跟随者——他们在定义长上下文架构的标杆。

Products产品 Jan 6 ★

NVIDIA CES 2025: Cosmos World Foundation Model and Project DIGITS英伟达 CES 2025: Cosmos 世界基础模型 and Project DIGITS

At CES 2025, NVIDIA announced two major initiatives: Cosmos, a world foundation model platform for training physical AI and robotics systems using synthetic video data; and Project DIGITS, a $3,000 personal AI supercomputer delivering 1 petaflop of AI performance using the GB10 Grace Blackwell Superchip. Cosmos aimed to accelerate autonomous vehicle and robotics development by generating physically accurate simulation data. Project DIGITS brought AI supercomputer capability to a desktop form factor, democratizing local AI model deployment.



CES 2025 上，NVIDIA 发布两大计划：Cosmos 世界基础模型平台（用合成视频数据训练物理 AI 和机器人系统）和 Project DIGITS（$3,000 个人 AI 超级计算机，搭载 GB10 Grace Blackwell 超级芯片，1 petaflop AI 算力）。Cosmos 加速自动驾驶和机器人开发，Project DIGITS 把 AI 超算搬上桌面。
CES 2025 上，NVIDIA 发布两大计划：Cosmos 世界基础模型平台（用合成视频数据训练物理 AI 和机器人系统）和 Project DIGITS（$3,000 个人 AI 超级计算机，搭载 GB10 Grace Blackwell 超级芯片，1 petaflop AI 算力）。Cosmos 加速自动驾驶和机器人开发，Project DIGITS 把 AI 超算搬上桌面。

OpenAI Launches ChatGPT Pro at $200/MonthOpenAI 发布 ChatGPT Pro at $200/Month

OpenAI launched ChatGPT Pro, a premium $200/month subscription tier offering unlimited access to its most advanced models including o1 Pro Mode. The Pro tier was designed for power users requiring the highest performance with no rate limits. It included access to OpenAI's extended thinking capabilities via o1 Pro, which used significantly more compute to solve harder problems. The launch signaled OpenAI's move toward a multi-tier commercial strategy targeting professionals and enterprise users.



OpenAI 上线 ChatGPT Pro，$200/月高端订阅，无限使用最强模型，包括 o1 Pro Mode。o1 Pro 调用大量算力解决更难的问题。Pro 套餐标志着 OpenAI 面向专业用户和企业的多层商业策略。

Models模型 Dec 3 ★

Amazon Launches Nova — First Proprietary AI Model Family亚马逊 发布 Nova — First Proprietary AI Model Family

At AWS re:Invent 2024, Amazon launches the Nova family — Micro, Lite, Pro, and Canvas/Reel — its first proprietary frontier models trained in-house and offered via Bedrock.

So what? Amazon had been the "neutral platform" in AI, just selling Anthropic and others. Nova signals the transition: AWS is now a model builder, not just a cloud provider. With Bedrock as the distribution channel and Trainium as the silicon stack, Amazon is betting it can compete from cloud all the way down to silicon. That's a vertically integrated threat to OpenAI's enterprise moat.



AWS re:Invent 2024 上，Amazon 推出 Nova 家族——Micro、Lite、Pro 和 Canvas/Reel——首批自研前沿模型，通过 Bedrock 分发。Amazon 从「中立平台」变身「模型制造商」。Bedrock 做分发、Trainium 做芯片——从云到硅的垂直整合对 OpenAI 的企业护城河构成威胁。
AWS re:Invent 2024 上，Amazon 推出 Nova 家族——Micro、Lite、Pro 和 Canvas/Reel——首批自研前沿模型，通过 Bedrock 分发。Amazon 从「中立平台」变身「模型制造商」。Bedrock 做分发、Trainium 做芯片——从云到硅的垂直整合对 OpenAI 的企业护城河构成威胁。
Source: AWS Blog ↗来源: AWS Blog ↗

Products产品 Oct 31 ★

OpenAI Launches ChatGPT SearchOpenAI 发布 ChatGPT 搜索

OpenAI introduced ChatGPT Search on October 31, 2024, integrating real-time web search directly into ChatGPT with cited sources and up-to-date results. The feature challenged traditional search engines by delivering conversational, context-aware answers with direct links. It initially rolled out to ChatGPT Plus subscribers, then expanded to all logged-in users in December 2024, and to everyone in February 2025. ChatGPT Search positioned OpenAI as a direct competitor to Google Search for the first time.



OpenAI 推出 ChatGPT Search，直接在 ChatGPT 里集成实时网页搜索，带引用来源和最新结果。先向 Plus 用户开放，12 月扩展至所有登录用户，2025 年 2 月向所有人开放。OpenAI 首次直接挑战 Google 搜索。
OpenAI 推出 ChatGPT Search，直接在 ChatGPT 里集成实时网页搜索，带引用来源和最新结果。先向 Plus 用户开放，12 月扩展至所有登录用户，2025 年 2 月向所有人开放。OpenAI 首次直接挑战 Google 搜索。

Crypto×AICrypto×AI Oct 24 ★

ai16z Launches on Solana — First AI DAO Running Autonomous Agentsai16z 发布 on Solana — First AI DAO Running Autonomous Agents

ai16z — named as a parody of a16z — launched on Solana as the first AI-managed decentralized venture fund. Built by Shaw Walters, the project's AI agent "Eliza" makes investment decisions autonomously, using the open-source ElizaOS framework. Within weeks it became one of the largest AI tokens by market cap and spawned an ecosystem of thousands of AI agents. The ElizaOS framework became the de facto standard for building crypto-native AI agents.



ai16z（戏仿 a16z 命名）在 Solana 上线，首个 AI 管理的去中心化风投基金。AI 代理「Eliza」自主做投资决策，基于开源 ElizaOS 框架。数周内成为市值最大的 AI 代币之一，催生了数千个 AI 代理的生态。ElizaOS 成为构建 Crypto 原生 AI 代理的事实标准。
ai16z（戏仿 a16z 命名）在 Solana 上线，首个 AI 管理的去中心化风投基金。AI 代理「Eliza」自主做投资决策，基于开源 ElizaOS 框架。数周内成为市值最大的 AI 代币之一，催生了数千个 AI 代理的生态。ElizaOS 成为构建 Crypto 原生 AI 代理的事实标准。
