Products产品 Oct 22 ★

Claude 3.5 Sonnet Gains Computer Use CapabilityClaude 3.5 Sonnet 获得 Computer Use Capability

Anthropic released an upgraded Claude 3.5 Sonnet alongside the new Claude 3.5 Haiku, and introduced Computer Use — a groundbreaking capability allowing Claude to control a computer by viewing screenshots, moving the cursor, clicking, and typing. This marked the first time a widely available AI model could directly interact with a computer's graphical interface. Computer Use opened the door to autonomous agent workflows, though Anthropic cautioned it was an early, experimental feature. The update also included an improved Claude.ai interface.



Anthropic 发布升级版 Claude 3.5 Sonnet 和新的 Claude 3.5 Haiku，同时推出 Computer Use——让 Claude 可以通过查看截图、移动鼠标、点击和打字来操控电脑。这是首次有广泛可用的 AI 模型能直接操作图形界面。Computer Use 为自主代理工作流打开大门，Anthropic 标注这仍是早期实验性功能。
Anthropic 发布升级版 Claude 3.5 Sonnet 和新的 Claude 3.5 Haiku，同时推出 Computer Use——让 Claude 可以通过查看截图、移动鼠标、点击和打字来操控电脑。这是首次有广泛可用的 AI 模型能直接操作图形界面。Computer Use 为自主代理工作流打开大门，Anthropic 标注这仍是早期实验性功能。

Crypto×AICrypto×AI Oct 10 ★

$GOAT Token Explodes — Truth Terminal AI Agent Sparks Memecoin Mania$GOAT 代币爆发 — Truth Terminal AI Agent 引爆 Memecoin 狂潮

An AI agent called Truth Terminal, created by researcher Andy Ayrey, inadvertently catalyzed the $GOAT memecoin on Solana, which surged to over $800M market cap. The event ignited the AI agent token narrative and is widely considered the starting point of the crypto×AI agent mania.



研究者 Andy Ayrey 创建的 AI 代理 Truth Terminal 无意间催生了 Solana 上的 $GOAT 迷因币，市值飙至 $800M 以上。这一事件点燃了 AI 代理代币叙事，被广泛视为 Crypto×AI 代理狂潮的起点。

Industry行业 Oct 9 ★

Nobel Prize in Chemistry Awarded to Hassabis, Jumper & Baker for AlphaFold诺贝尔化学奖授予 Hassabis、Jumper 和 Baker（AlphaFold）

The 2024 Nobel Prize in Chemistry was split between David Baker (for computational protein design) and Demis Hassabis & John Jumper (for AlphaFold's protein structure prediction). AlphaFold solved a 50-year grand challenge in biology and has accelerated drug discovery globally. Two Nobel Prizes for AI in two consecutive days underscored the technology's transformative scientific impact.



2024 年诺贝尔化学奖由 David Baker（计算蛋白质设计）和 Demis Hassabis、John Jumper（AlphaFold 蛋白质结构预测）分享。AlphaFold 解决了生物学 50 年的重大挑战，加速全球药物发现。连续两天两个诺贝尔奖颁给 AI——技术的变革性影响不言而喻。
2024 年诺贝尔化学奖由 David Baker（计算蛋白质设计）和 Demis Hassabis、John Jumper（AlphaFold 蛋白质结构预测）分享。AlphaFold 解决了生物学 50 年的重大挑战，加速全球药物发现。连续两天两个诺贝尔奖颁给 AI——技术的变革性影响不言而喻。
Source: Nobel Prize ↗来源: Nobel Prize ↗
Industry行业 Oct 8 ★

Nobel Prize in Physics Awarded to AI Pioneers Hinton & Hopfield诺贝尔物理学奖授予 AI 先驱 Hinton 和 Hopfield

The Royal Swedish Academy of Sciences awarded the 2024 Nobel Prize in Physics jointly to John Hopfield and Geoffrey Hinton "for foundational discoveries and inventions that enable machine learning with artificial neural networks." The award — surprising many physicists — validated decades of work on neural nets and marked AI's formal recognition by the scientific establishment. Hinton had left Google just months earlier warning of AI's dangers.



2024 年诺贝尔物理学奖授予 John Hopfield 和 Geoffrey Hinton，表彰他们「在利用人工神经网络实现机器学习方面的奠基性发现和发明」。这个奖让很多物理学家意外——AI 获得了科学最高殿堂的正式认可。Hinton 几个月前刚从 Google 辞职警告 AI 的危险。
2024 年诺贝尔物理学奖授予 John Hopfield 和 Geoffrey Hinton，表彰他们「在利用人工神经网络实现机器学习方面的奠基性发现和发明」。这个奖让很多物理学家意外——AI 获得了科学最高殿堂的正式认可。Hinton 几个月前刚从 Google 辞职警告 AI 的危险。
Source: Nobel Prize ↗来源: Nobel Prize ↗
Products产品 Oct 3

OpenAI Introduces ChatGPT CanvasOpenAI 推出 ChatGPT Canvas

OpenAI launched Canvas, a new collaborative interface within ChatGPT designed for writing and coding projects that go beyond simple chat. Canvas opens in a separate window alongside the chat, giving users a persistent workspace where they can make targeted edits, run Python code, and iterate on documents or code with AI assistance. The feature was initially rolled out to ChatGPT Plus and Team users before becoming available to all users in December 2024. Canvas represented OpenAI's push to make ChatGPT a full-fledged creative and development co-pilot.



OpenAI 推出 Canvas，ChatGPT 里的协作式创作界面，专为写作和编程项目设计。Canvas 在聊天旁打开独立窗口，用户可以在持久工作空间里做定向编辑、跑 Python 代码、和 AI 一起迭代文档或代码。OpenAI 在把 ChatGPT 打造成全功能的创作和开发副驾驶。
OpenAI 推出 Canvas，ChatGPT 里的协作式创作界面，专为写作和编程项目设计。Canvas 在聊天旁打开独立窗口，用户可以在持久工作空间里做定向编辑、跑 Python 代码、和 AI 一起迭代文档或代码。OpenAI 在把 ChatGPT 打造成全功能的创作和开发副驾驶。
Source: OpenAI ↗来源: OpenAI ↗
Funding融资 Oct 2 ★

OpenAI Raises $6.6B at $157B ValuationOpenAI 融资 $6.6B at $157B Valuation

OpenAI closed a $6.6 billion funding round led by Thrive Capital, valuing the company at $157 billion — making it one of the most valuable private companies in the world. The round included investments from Microsoft, NVIDIA, SoftBank, and others. The capital was earmarked for compute infrastructure, research, and continued product development. The raise came as OpenAI was exploring a transition from its nonprofit-controlled structure to a for-profit benefit corporation, raising governance questions across the AI industry.



OpenAI 完成 $6.6B 融资，Thrive Capital 领投，估值 $157B——全球最有价值的私有公司之一。Microsoft、NVIDIA、SoftBank 等参投。资金用于算力基础设施、研究和产品开发。此轮融资正值 OpenAI 探索从非营利控制结构转型为营利性公益公司。
OpenAI 完成 $6.6B 融资，Thrive Capital 领投，估值 $157B——全球最有价值的私有公司之一。Microsoft、NVIDIA、SoftBank 等参投。资金用于算力基础设施、研究和产品开发。此轮融资正值 OpenAI 探索从非营利控制结构转型为营利性公益公司。
Source: OpenAI ↗来源: OpenAI ↗
Products产品 Oct 1 ★

OpenAI Launches Realtime API for Voice AIOpenAI 发布 Realtime API for Voice AI

OpenAI launched the Realtime API in public beta on October 1, 2024, enabling developers to build low-latency, speech-to-speech conversational experiences powered by GPT-4o. The API supports six preset voices and handles interruptions natively, enabling more natural human-AI dialogue. It unlocks a new class of voice agent applications without requiring developers to stitch together separate ASR, LLM, and TTS pipelines. The Realtime API marked OpenAI's first developer-facing product for building persistent, interactive voice agents at scale.



OpenAI 公测 Realtime API，让开发者用 GPT-4o 构建低延迟语音对话体验。支持 6 种预设音色，原生处理打断。不用再拼接 ASR、LLM、TTS 三条管线——OpenAI 首次面向开发者推出构建持久交互式语音代理的产品。
OpenAI 公测 Realtime API，让开发者用 GPT-4o 构建低延迟语音对话体验。支持 6 种预设音色，原生处理打断。不用再拼接 ASR、LLM、TTS 三条管线——OpenAI 首次面向开发者推出构建持久交互式语音代理的产品。
Source: OpenAI ↗来源: OpenAI ↗
Sep
Products产品 Sep 26 ★

Hugging Face Hits 1 Million Models — Open-Source AI Reaches Critical MassHugging Face 突破 1 Million Models — 开源 AI Reaches Critical Mass

Hugging Face surpasses 1 million public AI model listings on its Hub, cementing its role as the de facto repository of open-source AI. Growing from 300K models in March 2024 to 1M in September.

So what? GitHub moment for AI. When a platform has 1M models, it stops being a tool and becomes infrastructure — every company building AI touches Hugging Face. The exponential growth reflects open-source AI's commoditization: what required frontier labs in 2023 is now community-built and freely shared. Anyone building closed systems is fighting an increasingly large open tide.



Hugging Face Hub 上的公开 AI 模型突破 100 万个，从 3 月的 30 万到 9 月的 100 万。当一个平台有 100 万模型时，它不再是工具——它是基础设施。开源 AI 的指数级增长说明了一切：2023 年需要前沿实验室做的事，现在社区就能做。
Hugging Face Hub 上的公开 AI 模型突破 100 万个，从 3 月的 30 万到 9 月的 100 万。当一个平台有 100 万模型时，它不再是工具——它是基础设施。开源 AI 的指数级增长说明了一切：2023 年需要前沿实验室做的事，现在社区就能做。
Source: Hugging Face ↗来源: Hugging Face ↗
Models模型 Sep 25 ★

Meta Releases Llama 3.2 with Multimodal CapabilitiesMeta 发布 Llama 3.2 with Multimodal Capabilities

Meta released Llama 3.2 at Meta Connect on September 25, 2024, introducing multimodal vision capabilities to the Llama model family for the first time. The release included 11B and 90B vision-enabled models alongside lightweight 1B and 3B models optimized for edge and mobile deployment. Llama 3.2 could process both text and images, enabling tasks like visual question answering and document analysis. The lightweight models were designed to run on-device, including on Meta's smart glasses and smartphones.



Meta 在 Meta Connect 上发布 Llama 3.2，首次为 Llama 家族加入多模态视觉能力。包含 11B 和 90B 视觉模型，以及优化边缘和移动端部署的 1B 和 3B 轻量模型。能处理文本和图片，支持视觉问答和文档分析。轻量版可以在手机和智能眼镜上本地运行。
Meta 在 Meta Connect 上发布 Llama 3.2，首次为 Llama 家族加入多模态视觉能力。包含 11B 和 90B 视觉模型，以及优化边缘和移动端部署的 1B 和 3B 轻量模型。能处理文本和图片，支持视觉问答和文档分析。轻量版可以在手机和智能眼镜上本地运行。

OpenAI o1 Reasoning ModelOpenAI o1 推理模型

OpenAI releases o1, a model trained with reinforcement learning to "think before answering," excelling at math, coding, and science.

So what? The paradigm shifts from "next token prediction" to "chain-of-thought reasoning." This is the beginning of System 2 thinking in AI — a step toward AGI.



OpenAI 发布 o1，用强化学习训练模型「先想再答」，在数学、编程和科学上表现突出。范式从「预测下一个 token」转向「思维链推理」——AI 的 System 2 思维起步，迈向 AGI 的一步。

MiniMax Launches Hailuo AI Video — China's Sora MomentMiniMax 发布 Hailuo AI Video — China's Sora Moment

MiniMax launches video-01 under its Hailuo AI brand — a high-quality text-to-video generation model that goes viral globally for its cinematic output quality, especially character consistency.

So what? While the West debated Sora's restricted access, China shipped. Hailuo AI's viral demos showed that video generation quality was no longer a US-exclusive capability. MiniMax proved it could build multimodal creative AI at consumer scale — and ship it openly to the public while OpenAI kept Sora behind waitlists.



MiniMax 以 Hailuo AI 品牌上线 video-01 文生视频模型，电影级输出质量迅速全球走红，角色一致性尤其突出。西方还在等 Sora 开放时，中国直接出货了。Hailuo AI 证明视频生成能力不再是美国独有。

DeepSeek Releases DeepSeek-V2.5DeepSeek 发布 DeepSeek-V2.5

DeepSeek released DeepSeek-V2.5 in September 2024, merging the capabilities of DeepSeek-V2-Chat and DeepSeek-Coder-V2 into a unified model with improved general and coding abilities. The combined model delivered better alignment, stronger reasoning, and enhanced coding performance compared to running separate V2 variants. DeepSeek-V2.5 was subsequently revised in December 2024. The release demonstrated DeepSeek's rapid iteration pace in producing best-in-class open-source models.



DeepSeek 发布 V2.5，将 V2-Chat 和 Coder-V2 合并为统一模型，通用和编程能力同步提升。对齐效果更好，推理更强，编程表现增强。12 月又做了修订版。展现了 DeepSeek 在开源模型领域极快的迭代节奏。

xAI Releases Grok-2 with Vision and Image GenerationxAI 发布 Grok-2 with Vision and Image Generation

xAI released Grok-2 on August 14, 2024, a major upgrade featuring multimodal vision understanding and access to Aurora, xAI's image generation model, making it one of the first commercial chatbots with integrated text-to-image generation. Grok-2 demonstrated competitive performance with GPT-4o and Claude 3.5 Sonnet on reasoning and knowledge benchmarks. It was made available to X Premium and Premium+ subscribers, with a more efficient Grok-2 mini variant released alongside it. The launch also marked xAI's first push toward making Grok a standalone product beyond just an X platform feature.



xAI 发布 Grok-2，支持多模态视觉理解，集成 Aurora 图像生成模型——首批自带文生图功能的商用聊天机器人之一。在推理和知识基准上与 GPT-4o 和 Claude 3.5 Sonnet 竞争。面向 X Premium 和 Premium+ 用户开放，同时上线更高效的 Grok-2 mini。

NEAR Protocol Announces AI-First Strategic PivotNEAR Protocol 宣布 AI-First Strategic Pivot

NEAR Protocol announced a strategic pivot to become the chain for user-owned AI, launching NEAR AI with plans for AI assistants, agent infrastructure, and decentralized AI model training. Co-founder Illia Polosukhin (Transformer paper co-author) positioned NEAR as the natural bridge between AI and crypto.



NEAR Protocol 宣布战略转型为用户自主 AI 的底层链，推出 NEAR AI 计划，涵盖 AI 助手、代理基础设施和去中心化 AI 模型训练。联合创始人 Illia Polosukhin（Transformer 论文合著者）将 NEAR 定位为 AI 与 Crypto 之间的天然桥梁。

Crypto×AICrypto×AI Aug 1

NEAR Protocol Pivots to Become the 'AI Layer' of Web3NEAR Protocol 转型 to Become the 'AI Layer' of Web3

NEAR Protocol formalized its strategic pivot to become the AI layer for Web3, emphasizing chain abstraction and AI-native decentralized applications. The foundation announced a $20M fund to accelerate AI development on NEAR. The strategy repositioned NEAR from a general L1 blockchain to a specialized platform for building AI agents and autonomous on-chain applications.



NEAR Protocol 正式战略转向，定位为 Web3 的 AI 层，强调链抽象和 AI 原生去中心化应用。基金会宣布 $20M 专项资金加速 NEAR 上的 AI 开发。NEAR 从通用 L1 公链重新定位为 AI 代理和链上自主应用的专用平台。

Mistral Large 2 ReleasedMistral Large 2 发布

Mistral AI releases Mistral Large 2 (123B), competing with GPT-4o and Llama 3.1 on coding and reasoning.

So what? Europe has a serious AI contender. Geographic diversification of AI capabilities matters for geopolitics and regulatory arbitrage.



Mistral AI 发布 Mistral Large 2（123B），在编程和推理上对标 GPT-4o 和 Llama 3.1。欧洲有了真正的前沿 AI 竞争者，AI 能力的地理多元化对地缘政治和监管套利意义重大。

Models模型 Jul 23 ★

Meta Llama 3.1 405B — Open Source Reaches GPT-4 ClassMeta Llama 3.1 405B — 开源 Reaches GPT-4 Class

Meta releases Llama 3.1 405B — 15 trillion tokens, 16,000 GPUs, and the first open-weight model to credibly match GPT-4 on real benchmarks. Available as API and for local deployment.

So what? This is the moment open-source caught up to the frontier. Any lab, researcher, or startup can now fine-tune a GPT-4 tier model without paying OpenAI. It didn't just open a door — it demolished a wall. The "open vs. closed" debate in AI permanently shifted, and every enterprise that cared about data privacy suddenly had a legitimate alternative.



Meta 开源 Llama 3.1 405B——150 万亿 token 训练、16,000 块 GPU，首个在真实基准上追平 GPT-4 的开源模型。开源追上前沿的时刻。任何实验室、研究者或创业公司都能微调 GPT-4 级模型而不用给 OpenAI 付费。「开源 vs 闭源」的辩论永久性转向。
Meta 开源 Llama 3.1 405B——150 万亿 token 训练、16,000 块 GPU，首个在真实基准上追平 GPT-4 的开源模型。开源追上前沿的时刻。任何实验室、研究者或创业公司都能微调 GPT-4 级模型而不用给 OpenAI 付费。「开源 vs 闭源」的辩论永久性转向。

Models模型 Jul 18

OpenAI Releases GPT-4o MiniOpenAI 发布 GPT-4o Mini

OpenAI released GPT-4o mini, a highly cost-efficient small model designed to replace GPT-3.5 Turbo across most use cases. At $0.15 per million input tokens, it was far cheaper than previous models while outperforming GPT-4 Turbo on key benchmarks. GPT-4o mini supported both text and vision inputs and featured a 128K context window. The release democratized access to powerful AI capabilities and became the default model for high-volume API applications.



OpenAI 发布 GPT-4o mini，高性价比小模型，替代 GPT-3.5 Turbo。输入价格 $0.15/百万 token，在关键基准上超越 GPT-4 Turbo。支持文本和视觉输入，128K 上下文窗口。成为高流量 API 应用的默认选择。
OpenAI 发布 GPT-4o mini，高性价比小模型，替代 GPT-3.5 Turbo。输入价格 $0.15/百万 token，在关键基准上超越 GPT-4 Turbo。支持文本和视觉输入，128K 上下文窗口。成为高流量 API 应用的默认选择。

Skild AI Raises $300M Series A for General-Purpose Robot Foundation ModelSkild AI 融资 $300M Series A for General-Purpose Robot 基础模型

Pittsburgh-based Skild AI emerged from stealth with a $300M Series A — the largest robotics AI round of 2024 — led by Lightspeed, Coatue, SoftBank, and Jeff Bezos. Skild is building the world's first general-purpose robotic foundation model: one brain that can control any robot across any task. At a $1.5B valuation, it signaled that the robotics AI race had entered a new capital-intensive phase.



匹兹堡 Skild AI 以 $300M A 轮融资走出隐身模式——2024 年机器人 AI 最大单轮。Lightspeed、Coatue、SoftBank 和 Jeff Bezos 参投。Skild 在造世界首个通用机器人基础模型：一个大脑控制任何机器人执行任何任务。$1.5B 估值标志着机器人 AI 竞赛进入烧钱新阶段。

Models模型 Jun 27

Google Releases Gemma 2Google 发布 Gemma 2

Google released Gemma 2 on June 27, 2024, with significantly improved performance over the original Gemma models. Available in 9B and 27B parameter sizes, Gemma 2 demonstrated competitive performance with much larger models while remaining efficient enough to run on a single GPU or TPU. The models featured improvements in reasoning, code generation, and multilingual capabilities. Gemma 2 became the preferred open-weights baseline for researchers evaluating efficient AI architectures.



Google 发布 Gemma 2，9B 和 27B 版本，性能比初代大幅提升。单卡 GPU 或 TPU 就能跑，推理、代码和多语言能力全面增强。Gemma 2 成为研究者评估高效 AI 架构时的首选开源基线。

Anthropic releases Claude 3.5 Sonnet, outperforming Claude 3 Opus at Sonnet-tier pricing and speed.

Sequoia Capital publishes analysis showing AI companies need to generate $600B in revenue to justify current infrastructure spend.

So what? The first serious "show me the money" moment for AI. Reminds me of the 2000 dot-com reality check — but this time the tech actually works.

Models模型 Jun 12 ★

Stability AI Releases Stable Diffusion 3 MediumStability AI 发布 Stable Diffusion 3 Medium

Stability AI released Stable Diffusion 3 Medium on June 12, 2024, making the open-weights version of its next-generation text-to-image model publicly available after months of enterprise preview. SD3 Medium uses a novel Multimodal Diffusion Transformer (MMDiT) architecture that dramatically improves text rendering within images and multi-subject scene composition. The open release democratized access to state-of-the-art image generation, with larger variants (SD3 Large and SD3 Ultra) available via the API. SD3 Medium was followed by Stable Diffusion 3.5 in October 2024, cementing Stability AI's position as the leading open-source image generation platform.



Stability AI 开源 Stable Diffusion 3 Medium，采用全新 Multimodal Diffusion Transformer (MMDiT) 架构，文字渲染和多主体场景构图大幅提升。更大版本（SD3 Large/Ultra）通过 API 开放。10 月又发布 SD 3.5，巩固了 Stability AI 在开源图像生成领域的领先地位。
Stability AI 开源 Stable Diffusion 3 Medium，采用全新 Multimodal Diffusion Transformer (MMDiT) 架构，文字渲染和多主体场景构图大幅提升。更大版本（SD3 Large/Ultra）通过 API 开放。10 月又发布 SD 3.5，巩固了 Stability AI 在开源图像生成领域的领先地位。

Mistral Raises €600M Series B at €5.8B ValuationMistral 融资 €600M Series B at €5.8B Valuation

Mistral AI closes €600M (~$645M) Series B, bringing valuation to €5.8B ($6.2B). Backed by Andreessen Horowitz, General Catalyst, and others — cementing it as Europe's most valuable AI lab.

So what? In just 12 months from founding, Mistral became Europe's flagship AI champion. The raise wasn't just money — it was a geopolitical statement: Europe has a credible alternative to US hyperscalers and a potential counterweight to US/China AI duopoly narratives. The €5.8B valuation set the benchmark for sovereign AI investment.



Mistral AI 完成 €600M（约 $645M）B 轮融资，估值 €5.8B。a16z、General Catalyst 等参投。成立仅 12 个月就成为欧洲最有价值的 AI 实验室。这不只是一轮融资——更是地缘政治信号：欧洲有了对抗美国超大规模厂商的可信替代方案。

Alibaba Releases Qwen2 — China's Most Capable Open-Weight Model Family阿里巴巴 发布 Qwen2 — China's Most Capable Open-Weight Model Family

Alibaba releases Qwen2 — a family of models (0.5B to 72B) that tops open-source leaderboards for multilingual performance, with strong coding and reasoning. Qwen2-72B outperforms Llama 3 70B and challenges frontier closed models on Chinese benchmarks.

So what? Qwen2 set the benchmark for what a Chinese open-weight model family could be: multilingual by design (29 languages), strong on global benchmarks, and fully open-weight. For any enterprise needing Chinese + English AI without vendor lock-in, Qwen2 became the default. Alibaba's cloud distribution made it the most widely deployed open-source model in China.



阿里巴巴开源 Qwen2 模型家族（0.5B 到 72B），在多语言基准上领先开源榜单。Qwen2-72B 超越 Llama 3 70B，在中文基准上叫板闭源前沿模型。29 种语言支持、全球基准强势，加上阿里云的分发能力——Qwen2 成为中国最广泛部署的开源模型。
阿里巴巴开源 Qwen2 模型家族（0.5B 到 72B），在多语言基准上领先开源榜单。Qwen2-72B 超越 Llama 3 70B，在中文基准上叫板闭源前沿模型。29 种语言支持、全球基准强势，加上阿里云的分发能力——Qwen2 成为中国最广泛部署的开源模型。

Models模型 May 29

Mistral Releases Codestral — First European AI Code ModelMistral 发布 Codestral — First European AI Code Model

Mistral launches Codestral (22B), its first code-specialized model. Designed for code completion and generation across 80+ programming languages, with fill-in-the-middle (FIM) support.

So what? Mistral signaled it's not just playing "open-source GPT" — it's carving out developer-specific vertical markets. Codestral integrates with VS Code, JetBrains, and Continue, making it competitive with GitHub Copilot for developers who prefer local or EU-hosted models. Europe's first serious contender in the coding AI race.



Mistral 上线 Codestral（22B），首款代码专用模型，支持 80+ 编程语言的代码补全和生成，带 fill-in-the-middle（FIM）功能。集成 VS Code、JetBrains 和 Continue，成为偏好本地或欧洲托管的开发者替代 GitHub Copilot 的选择。欧洲在编程 AI 赛道首次有了真正的竞争者。

Funding融资 May 26 ★

xAI Raises $6B Series B at $24B ValuationxAI 融资 $6B Series B at $24B Valuation

xAI closed a $6 billion Series B funding round on May 26, 2024, reaching a post-money valuation of $24 billion with participation from Andreessen Horowitz, Sequoia Capital, Valor Equity Partners, Vy Capital, Fidelity, and Prince Alwaleed Bin Talal. The capital was earmarked for scaling xAI's infrastructure, including the massive Colossus supercomputer cluster in Memphis, Tennessee used to train Grok models. The round established xAI as one of the best-funded AI startups globally within just one year of its founding. A second $6B round (Series C) followed in December 2024, bringing total raised to over $12 billion.



xAI 完成 $6B B 轮融资，估值 $24B。a16z、Sequoia、Fidelity 等顶级机构参投。资金用于扩建 Memphis 的 Colossus 超级计算集群来训练 Grok 模型。成立仅一年就跻身全球资金最充裕的 AI 创业公司。12 月又完成 $6B C 轮，总融资超 $12B。
xAI 完成 $6B B 轮融资，估值 $24B。a16z、Sequoia、Fidelity 等顶级机构参投。资金用于扩建 Memphis 的 Colossus 超级计算集群来训练 Grok 模型。成立仅一年就跻身全球资金最充裕的 AI 创业公司。12 月又完成 $6B C 轮，总融资超 $12B。

At the AI Seoul Summit, 16 leading AI companies including OpenAI, Google, Anthropic, Meta, and xAI signed voluntary Frontier AI Safety Commitments. The commitments included publishing safety frameworks, conducting red-teaming, and sharing safety information with governments.

Industry行业 May 8 ★

Google DeepMind Releases AlphaFold 3Google DeepMind 发布 AlphaFold 3

Google DeepMind and Isomorphic Labs unveiled AlphaFold 3 on May 8, 2024, a groundbreaking AI model capable of predicting the structure and interactions of all of life's molecules — proteins, DNA, RNA, ligands, and more. AlphaFold 3 dramatically improved upon its predecessor's accuracy, particularly for drug-target interactions. The model was made freely accessible to researchers via the AlphaFold Server. The release was hailed as a landmark in computational biology with profound implications for drug discovery and disease research.



Google DeepMind 和 Isomorphic Labs 亮相 AlphaFold 3，能预测所有生命分子的结构和相互作用——蛋白质、DNA、RNA、配体等。对药物靶点互作的预测精度大幅提升。通过 AlphaFold Server 免费开放给研究者。被誉为计算生物学的里程碑，对药物发现和疾病研究影响深远。
Google DeepMind 和 Isomorphic Labs 亮相 AlphaFold 3，能预测所有生命分子的结构和相互作用——蛋白质、DNA、RNA、配体等。对药物靶点互作的预测精度大幅提升。通过 AlphaFold Server 免费开放给研究者。被誉为计算生物学的里程碑，对药物发现和疾病研究影响深远。
Source: Google Blog ↗来源: Google Blog ↗
Models模型 May 7 ★

DeepSeek Releases DeepSeek-V2: Ultra-Efficient MoE ModelDeepSeek 发布 DeepSeek-V2: Ultra-Efficient MoE Model

DeepSeek released DeepSeek-V2 on May 7, 2024, a powerful 236B parameter Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) model that activated only 21B parameters per token. The architecture delivered GPT-4-level performance at a fraction of the inference cost, with API pricing 75% cheaper than GPT-4 Turbo. DeepSeek-V2 achieved state-of-the-art performance among open-source models on reasoning and coding benchmarks. The release demonstrated that Chinese AI labs could build frontier-level models using innovative architectures, foreshadowing DeepSeek's later global impact.



DeepSeek 发布 V2，236B 参数 MoE 模型，每个 token 只激活 21B 参数。GPT-4 级性能，API 价格比 GPT-4 Turbo 便宜 75%。在开源模型推理和编程基准上达到领先水平。中国 AI 实验室用创新架构造出前沿模型，为 DeepSeek 后来的全球影响埋下伏笔。
DeepSeek 发布 V2，236B 参数 MoE 模型，每个 token 只激活 21B 参数。GPT-4 级性能，API 价格比 GPT-4 Turbo 便宜 75%。在开源模型推理和编程基准上达到领先水平。中国 AI 实验室用创新架构造出前沿模型，为 DeepSeek 后来的全球影响埋下伏笔。

Models模型 Apr 23 ★

Microsoft Phi-3 — Frontier-Class AI That Runs on Your Phone微软 Phi-3 — Frontier-Class AI That Runs on Your Phone

Microsoft releases Phi-3-mini (3.8B), a small language model that achieves performance comparable to models 10× its size, capable of running fully on-device on a smartphone.

So what? AI isn't just about bigger and bigger — Phi-3 proved that quality data beats raw scale. For the first time, you could run a GPT-3.5 tier assistant locally without cloud. This kicked off the SLM race: on-device AI became viable, and every inference startup had to reckon with the edge. Microsoft's research team signaled: the future isn't only in the cloud.



Microsoft 发布 Phi-3-mini（3.8B），一个小语言模型，性能媲美大 10 倍的模型，手机就能跑。Phi-3 证明高质量数据比暴力堆参数更重要。首次实现本地运行 GPT-3.5 级别的助手，掀起了 SLM 竞赛——端侧 AI 正式可行。
Microsoft 发布 Phi-3-mini（3.8B），一个小语言模型，性能媲美大 10 倍的模型，手机就能跑。Phi-3 证明高质量数据比暴力堆参数更重要。首次实现本地运行 GPT-3.5 级别的助手，掀起了 SLM 竞赛——端侧 AI 正式可行。
Source: Microsoft Azure Blog ↗来源: Microsoft Azure Blog ↗

Meta Releases Llama 3 Open SourceMeta 发布 Llama 3 开源

Meta open-sources Llama 3 (8B and 70B), setting new benchmarks for open-weight models.

So what? Open source catches up fast. For builders, this means you can run near-GPT-4 quality locally. The commoditization of intelligence accelerates.



Meta 开源 Llama 3（8B 和 70B），刷新开源模型基准。对开发者来说，本地就能跑接近 GPT-4 品质的模型。智能的商品化在加速。
Meta 开源 Llama 3（8B 和 70B），刷新开源模型基准。对开发者来说，本地就能跑接近 GPT-4 品质的模型。智能的商品化在加速。

Products产品 Apr 18

Meta Launches Meta AI AssistantMeta 发布 Meta AI Assistant

Meta launched Meta AI, its AI assistant powered by the Meta Llama 3 model, on April 18, 2024. Meta AI was embedded directly into Facebook, Instagram, WhatsApp, and Messenger, as well as Meta Ray-Ban smart glasses. Users could interact with Meta AI via text, voice, and the camera on smart glasses. At launch, Meta AI could search the web in real time and generate images through Instagram. The rollout made Meta AI one of the most widely distributed AI assistants globally.



Meta 上线 Meta AI 助手，跑 Llama 3 模型，直接嵌入 Facebook、Instagram、WhatsApp、Messenger 和 Meta Ray-Ban 智能眼镜。支持文本、语音和眼镜摄像头交互，还能实时搜索和在 Instagram 生成图片。Meta AI 由此成为全球分发最广的 AI 助手之一。

NVIDIA announces Blackwell B200 GPU at GTC, claiming 30x inference speedup over Hopper for LLMs.

So what? Compute keeps scaling. NVIDIA's moat deepens. If you're investing in AI infrastructure, NVDA remains the picks-and-shovels play.



NVIDIA 在 GTC 上发布 Blackwell B200 GPU，声称 LLM 推理速度比 Hopper 快 30 倍。算力持续扩展，NVIDIA 的护城河越挖越深。

Products产品 Mar 22

Hugging Face Launches LeRobot — Democratizing Open-Source Robotics AIHugging Face 发布 LeRobot — Democratizing 开源 Robotics AI

Hugging Face launches LeRobot, an open-source library for real-world robotics machine learning in PyTorch, led by former Tesla scientist Remi Cadene. Includes models, datasets, and simulation environments on the Hub.

So what? Hugging Face, which democratized NLP and then vision AI, turns its model-sharing flywheel toward physical intelligence. LeRobot is to robotics what Transformers.py was to language models: a single library that packages best-in-class algorithms for anyone to run. As physical AI heats up, whoever owns the open robotics stack controls the research default.



Hugging Face 推出 LeRobot，一个用 PyTorch 做真实世界机器人机器学习的开源库，由前 Tesla 科学家 Remi Cadene 主导。包含模型、数据集和仿真环境。LeRobot 之于机器人，就像 Transformers.py 之于语言模型：一个打包了最优算法让所有人都能跑的库。
Hugging Face 推出 LeRobot，一个用 PyTorch 做真实世界机器人机器学习的开源库，由前 Tesla 科学家 Remi Cadene 主导。包含模型、数据集和仿真环境。LeRobot 之于机器人，就像 Transformers.py 之于语言模型：一个打包了最优算法让所有人都能跑的库。

NVIDIA launches GR00T foundation model initiative for humanoid robots, combining simulation, synthetic data, and embodied policy learning.

Models模型 Mar 17 ★

xAI Open-Sources Grok-1 (314B Parameters)xAI 开源 Grok-1 (314B Parameters)

xAI open-sourced Grok-1 on March 17, 2024, releasing the weights and architecture of its 314 billion parameter Mixture-of-Experts language model under the Apache 2.0 license on GitHub and Hugging Face. Grok-1 was the raw base model checkpoint from the pre-training phase completed in October 2023, not fine-tuned for dialogue — making it one of the largest open-weight models ever released at the time. The release came shortly after the open-source community had been debating whether frontier labs would ever release such large models. It significantly raised the bar for what the open-source AI ecosystem could work with and build upon.



xAI 开源 Grok-1，将 314B 参数的 MoE 模型权重和架构以 Apache 2.0 协议放到 GitHub 和 Hugging Face。Grok-1 是 2023 年 10 月完成预训练的原始基座模型，未做对话微调——当时开源过的最大模型之一。这次开源大幅抬高了开源 AI 生态能触及的天花板。
xAI 开源 Grok-1，将 314B 参数的 MoE 模型权重和架构以 Apache 2.0 协议放到 GitHub 和 Hugging Face。Grok-1 是 2023 年 10 月完成预训练的原始基座模型，未做对话微调——当时开源过的最大模型之一。这次开源大幅抬高了开源 AI 生态能触及的天花板。

Anthropic Releases Claude 3 HaikuAnthropic 发布 Claude 3 Haiku

Anthropic released Claude 3 Haiku, the fastest and most compact model in the Claude 3 family, designed for near-instant responsiveness in enterprise applications. Despite being the smallest Claude 3 model, Haiku outperformed many competitor models on key benchmarks. At just $0.25 per million input tokens, it offered the best price-performance ratio in the Claude lineup. Haiku was positioned as the go-to model for high-throughput, latency-sensitive production deployments.



Anthropic 发布 Claude 3 Haiku，Claude 3 家族中最快最紧凑的模型，专为企业级高吞吐低延迟场景设计。尽管最小，Haiku 在关键基准上仍超越不少竞品。输入价格仅 $0.25/百万 token，性价比拉满。

Crypto×AICrypto×AI Feb 27

AO Computer Launches on Arweave — Hyper-Parallel Compute LayerAO Computer 发布 on Arweave — Hyper-Parallel Compute Layer

Arweave launched AO Computer, a hyper-parallel computing environment built on top of its permanent storage layer. AO enables autonomous AI agents to run on decentralized infrastructure with verifiable computation, positioning Arweave beyond storage into AI compute.



Arweave 推出 AO Computer，一个构建在永久存储层之上的超并行计算环境。AO 让自主 AI 代理可以在去中心化基础设施上运行并进行可验证计算，Arweave 由此从存储扩展到 AI 计算领域。

Models模型 Feb 26

Mistral AI Launches Mistral LargeMistral AI 发布 Mistral Large

Mistral AI launched Mistral Large on February 26, 2024, its most capable model competing directly with GPT-4 and Claude 3. Mistral Large featured top-tier reasoning, 32K context window, strong multilingual abilities in English, French, Spanish, German, and Italian, and native function calling. It was made available through the La Plateforme API and Microsoft Azure. Mistral Large ranked second on the MMLU benchmark among publicly available models, firmly establishing Mistral as a frontier AI lab.



Mistral AI 上线 Mistral Large，正面对标 GPT-4 和 Claude 3。32K 上下文窗口，多语言能力突出，支持原生函数调用。通过 La Plateforme API 和 Microsoft Azure 开放。在 MMLU 基准上排名公开模型第二，Mistral 正式跻身前沿 AI 实验室行列。

Models模型 Feb 21 ★

Google Releases Gemma: Open-Source AI ModelsGoogle 发布 Gemma: 开源 AI Models

Google released Gemma on February 21, 2024 — a family of lightweight, open-weights AI models built from the same research and technology used to create Gemini. Available in 2B and 7B parameter sizes, Gemma models could run on laptops, workstations, or cloud infrastructure. Google provided pre-trained and instruction-tuned variants along with responsible use guidelines. Gemma became an immediate hit in the open-source AI community, offering Google-quality models that developers could freely use, fine-tune, and deploy.



Google 开源 Gemma，用造 Gemini 的同套技术打造的轻量级模型，2B 和 7B 两个版本，笔记本电脑就能跑。提供预训练和指令微调版本。Gemma 在开源社区迅速走红——Google 品质的模型，开发者可以自由使用、微调和部署。
Google 开源 Gemma，用造 Gemini 的同套技术打造的轻量级模型，2B 和 7B 两个版本，笔记本电脑就能跑。提供预训练和指令微调版本。Gemma 在开源社区迅速走红——Google 品质的模型，开发者可以自由使用、微调和部署。

Deepgram Nova-2 — Real-Time STT Sets New Accuracy StandardDeepgram Nova-2 — 实时语音转文字刷新精度标准

Deepgram releases Nova-2, its most accurate real-time speech-to-text model, beating competitors on accuracy, speed, and cost across multiple languages and domains.

So what? Voice AI finally became a production-grade infrastructure primitive. Nova-2's combination of sub-200ms latency, 40+ language support, and lower price-per-minute than Whisper made it the default choice for developers building conversational AI products. Real-time transcription moved from "technically possible" to "obviously good enough for enterprise."



Deepgram 发布 Nova-2，实时语音转文字模型，在准确率、速度和成本上全面碾压竞品。低于 200ms 延迟、40+ 语言、比 Whisper 更便宜——语音 AI 从「技术上可行」变成了「企业级可用」。

Zhipu AI Releases GLM-4 — China's GPT-4 Challenger Goes LiveZhipu AI 发布 GLM-4 — China's GPT-4 Challenger Goes Live

Zhipu AI releases GLM-4, its flagship large language model competing with GPT-4 on Chinese-language tasks and general reasoning, with multimodal and code capabilities.

So what? China's top AI labs didn't just close the gap on English benchmarks — GLM-4 showed strength on Chinese-specific reasoning where Western models underperform. For enterprise buyers in China, a domestically trained frontier model isn't just a preference — it's a regulatory and data sovereignty necessity. Zhipu's GLM line is China's most viable GPT-4 substitute.



智谱 AI 发布 GLM-4，旗舰大语言模型，在中文任务和通用推理上对标 GPT-4，支持多模态和代码生成。中国头部 AI 实验室不只是在追赶英文基准——GLM-4 在中文推理上展现了西方模型难以企及的优势。对中国企业买家来说，国产前沿模型不仅是偏好，更是监管和数据主权的必需。

OpenAI Launches GPT StoreOpenAI 发布 GPT Store

OpenAI launched the GPT Store, a marketplace where users can discover and deploy custom GPTs built by creators worldwide. At launch, over 3 million custom GPTs had already been created by users since the feature was announced at DevDay in November 2023. The store featured categories including productivity, education, and programming. OpenAI also announced plans for a revenue-sharing program with top GPT creators, signaling a new creator economy around custom AI assistants.



OpenAI 上线 GPT Store，用户可以发现和使用全球创作者做的自定义 GPTs。上线时已有超过 300 万个自定义 GPTs 被创建。商店覆盖生产力、教育、编程等类别。OpenAI 还宣布将推出创作者收入分成计划，预示着围绕自定义 AI 助手的新创作者经济。

Products产品 Jan 8

NVIDIA CES 2024: ACE and Digital Human Technologies英伟达 CES 2024: ACE and Digital Human Technologies

At CES 2024, NVIDIA showcased its Avatar Cloud Engine (ACE) technology enabling game developers to create AI-powered NPCs with dynamic, personalized conversations using natural language. NVIDIA also demonstrated digital human technologies through its Tokkio and Audio2Face platforms, showing photorealistic AI avatars capable of real-time conversation. The announcements highlighted NVIDIA's expansion beyond training chips into real-time AI inference for interactive applications. CEO Jensen Huang's keynote drew massive crowds as NVIDIA's AI dominance was at its peak.



CES 2024 上，NVIDIA 展示 Avatar Cloud Engine (ACE) 技术，让游戏开发者用自然语言给 NPC 注入 AI 驱动的动态对话能力。同时演示了 Tokkino 和 Audio2Face 平台的逼真 AI 数字人。这些动作凸显 NVIDIA 从训练芯片向实时 AI 推理交互领域扩张。Jensen Huang 的主题演讲人气爆棚，NVIDIA 的 AI 统治力正处巅峰。
CES 2024 上，NVIDIA 展示 Avatar Cloud Engine (ACE) 技术，让游戏开发者用自然语言给 NPC 注入 AI 驱动的动态对话能力。同时演示了 Tokkino 和 Audio2Face 平台的逼真 AI 数字人。这些动作凸显 NVIDIA 从训练芯片向实时 AI 推理交互领域扩张。Jensen Huang 的主题演讲人气爆棚，NVIDIA 的 AI 统治力正处巅峰。
Source: NVIDIA Blog ↗来源: NVIDIA Blog ↗
2023
Dec
Industry行业 Dec 27 ★

New York Times Sues OpenAI and Microsoft Over CopyrightNew York Times Sues OpenAI and 微软 Over Copyright

The New York Times filed a landmark copyright lawsuit against OpenAI and Microsoft, alleging their AI models were trained on millions of NYT articles without permission. The case became the highest-profile AI copyright dispute and a bellwether for the industry.



《纽约时报》起诉 OpenAI 和 Microsoft，指控 AI 模型未经许可用数百万篇 NYT 文章训练。这成为 AI 版权领域最具标志性的诉讼案，也是行业风向标。
《纽约时报》起诉 OpenAI 和 Microsoft，指控 AI 模型未经许可用数百万篇 NYT 文章训练。这成为 AI 版权领域最具标志性的诉讼案，也是行业风向标。
Source: NYT ↗来源: NYT ↗
Models模型 Dec 11 ★

Mistral AI Releases Mixtral 8x7B — Open-Source MoE ModelMistral AI 发布 Mixtral 8x7B — 开源 MoE Model

Mistral AI released Mixtral 8x7B on December 11, 2023, a sparse Mixture-of-Experts language model that uses only 2 of 8 expert networks per token, delivering GPT-3.5-level performance at a fraction of the inference cost. Released with open weights under the Apache 2.0 license, Mixtral 8x7B outperformed Llama 2 70B on most benchmarks despite using fewer active parameters. The model achieved strong multilingual performance in English, French, Italian, German, and Spanish, and excelled at code generation. Mixtral's efficient MoE architecture became one of the most influential open-source model designs of 2024, widely adopted and fine-tuned by the community.



Mistral AI 开源 Mixtral 8x7B，一款稀疏混合专家（MoE）模型，每个 token 只激活 8 个专家中的 2 个，用极低推理成本达到 GPT-3.5 水平。Apache 2.0 协议开放权重，在多数基准上超越 Llama 2 70B。多语言能力突出，代码生成优秀。Mixtral 的 MoE 架构成为 2024 年最有影响力的开源模型设计之一。
Mistral AI 开源 Mixtral 8x7B，一款稀疏混合专家（MoE）模型，每个 token 只激活 8 个专家中的 2 个，用极低推理成本达到 GPT-3.5 水平。Apache 2.0 协议开放权重，在多数基准上超越 Llama 2 70B。多语言能力突出，代码生成优秀。Mixtral 的 MoE 架构成为 2024 年最有影响力的开源模型设计之一。
Source: Mistral AI ↗来源: Mistral AI ↗
Models模型 Dec 6 ★

Google Releases Gemini 1.0Google 发布 Gemini 1.0

Google unveiled Gemini 1.0 on December 6, 2023 — its most capable and general AI model, designed to be natively multimodal across text, images, audio, video, and code. Gemini came in three sizes: Ultra, Pro, and Nano. Gemini Ultra outperformed GPT-4 on 30 of 32 academic benchmarks and was the first model to surpass human experts on the MMLU benchmark. The launch marked Google's most significant response to ChatGPT and its renewed commitment to AI leadership.



Google 亮相 Gemini 1.0——原生多模态 AI 模型，横跨文本、图片、音频、视频和代码。三个版本：Ultra、Pro 和 Nano。Gemini Ultra 在 32 项学术基准中的 30 项超越 GPT-4，首次在 MMLU 基准上超过人类专家。这是 Google 对 ChatGPT 最有力的回击。
Google 亮相 Gemini 1.0——原生多模态 AI 模型，横跨文本、图片、音频、视频和代码。三个版本：Ultra、Pro 和 Nano。Gemini Ultra 在 32 项学术基准中的 30 项超越 GPT-4，首次在 MMLU 基准上超过人类专家。这是 Google 对 ChatGPT 最有力的回击。
Source: Google Blog ↗来源: Google Blog ↗
Nov
Models模型 Nov 21 ★

Claude 2.1 Expands Context to 200K TokensClaude 2.1 扩展 Context to 200K Tokens

Anthropic released Claude 2.1, doubling the context window to 200,000 tokens — the longest of any publicly available AI model at the time. The model also featured reduced hallucination rates and improved instruction following. Claude 2.1 could process entire codebases, financial reports, or legal documents in a single context. The 200K window set a new standard for enterprise long-document AI applications.



Anthropic 发布 Claude 2.1，上下文窗口翻倍至 200,000 token——当时公开可用 AI 模型中最长。幻觉率降低，指令执行更精准。Claude 2.1 可以一次处理整个代码库、财报或法律文件。200K 窗口为企业级长文档 AI 应用树立了新标准。
Anthropic 发布 Claude 2.1，上下文窗口翻倍至 200,000 token——当时公开可用 AI 模型中最长。幻觉率降低，指令执行更精准。Claude 2.1 可以一次处理整个代码库、财报或法律文件。200K 窗口为企业级长文档 AI 应用树立了新标准。
Source: Anthropic ↗来源: Anthropic ↗
Funding融资 Nov 17 ★

OpenAI Fires and Reinstates Sam AltmanOpenAI 解雇 and Reinstates Sam Altman

On November 17, 2023, OpenAI's board abruptly fired CEO Sam Altman, citing a loss of confidence in his candor. The move triggered immediate chaos: President Greg Brockman resigned, hundreds of employees threatened to follow Altman to Microsoft, and investors were blindsided. After four days of intense negotiations and near-collapse of the company, Altman was reinstated as CEO on November 21 with a reconstituted board. The saga exposed deep tensions between OpenAI's nonprofit governance structure and its commercial ambitions, accelerating the company's push toward a for-profit restructuring.



OpenAI 董事会突然解雇 CEO Sam Altman，引发巨震：总裁 Greg Brockman 辞职，数百员工威胁跟随 Altman 去 Microsoft，投资人措手不及。经过四天激烈博弈和公司几近崩溃，Altman 在 11 月 21 日复职，董事会重组。这场风波暴露了 OpenAI 非营利治理结构与商业野心之间的深层矛盾，加速了公司向营利性转型的步伐。
OpenAI 董事会突然解雇 CEO Sam Altman，引发巨震：总裁 Greg Brockman 辞职，数百员工威胁跟随 Altman 去 Microsoft，投资人措手不及。经过四天激烈博弈和公司几近崩溃，Altman 在 11 月 21 日复职，董事会重组。这场风波暴露了 OpenAI 非营利治理结构与商业野心之间的深层矛盾，加速了公司向营利性转型的步伐。
Source: OpenAI ↗来源: OpenAI ↗
Crypto×AICrypto×AI Nov 8

Ritual Raises $25M Seed to Decentralize AI InfrastructureRitual 融资 $25M Seed to Decentralize AI Infrastructure

Ritual raised $25M in seed funding to build open, decentralized infrastructure for AI computation. The project aims to break the monopoly of large tech companies on AI access by enabling permissionless AI inference on-chain. Backed by Archetype and others, Ritual became an early pioneer of the AI×crypto infrastructure narrative.



Ritual 完成 $25M 种子轮融资，致力于构建去中心化的开放 AI 计算基础设施。项目目标是打破大科技公司对 AI 的垄断，实现链上无许可 AI 推理。Archetype 等机构参投，Ritual 成为 AI×Crypto 基础设施赛道的早期先驱。
Ritual 完成 $25M 种子轮融资，致力于构建去中心化的开放 AI 计算基础设施。项目目标是打破大科技公司对 AI 的垄断，实现链上无许可 AI 推理。Archetype 等机构参投，Ritual 成为 AI×Crypto 基础设施赛道的早期先驱。
Source: CoinDesk ↗来源: CoinDesk ↗
Products产品 Nov 6 ★

OpenAI DevDay: GPT-4 Turbo and Custom GPTsOpenAI DevDay：GPT-4 Turbo 和自定义 GPTs

At its first developer conference DevDay, OpenAI announced GPT-4 Turbo with a 128K context window and knowledge cutoff of April 2023, along with dramatically reduced pricing. The event also introduced custom GPTs — user-created versions of ChatGPT configured with specific instructions, knowledge, and tools. The GPT Store was announced as a forthcoming marketplace for sharing custom GPTs. DevDay marked OpenAI's transition from research lab to full-scale developer platform.



OpenAI 首届开发者大会 DevDay 上，发布 GPT-4 Turbo（128K 上下文窗口），价格大幅下降。同时推出自定义 GPTs——用户可以按需配置专属 ChatGPT，并预告 GPT Store 即将上线。DevDay 标志着 OpenAI 从研究实验室向全功能开发者平台转型。
OpenAI 首届开发者大会 DevDay 上，发布 GPT-4 Turbo（128K 上下文窗口），价格大幅下降。同时推出自定义 GPTs——用户可以按需配置专属 ChatGPT，并预告 GPT Store 即将上线。DevDay 标志着 OpenAI 从研究实验室向全功能开发者平台转型。
Source: OpenAI ↗来源: OpenAI ↗
Industry行业 Nov 1 ★

First Global AI Safety Summit at Bletchley ParkFirst Global AI 安全峰会 at Bletchley Park

The UK hosted the world's first global AI Safety Summit at the historic Bletchley Park — birthplace of modern computing. Representatives from 28 countries including the US, China, and EU signed the "Bletchley Declaration," acknowledging AI's existential risks. Major AI companies committed to sharing safety information with governments. A landmark moment for international AI governance.



英国在布莱切利庄园——现代计算的诞生地——举办首届全球 AI 安全峰会。28 个国家的代表（包括美国、中国和欧盟）签署《布莱切利宣言》，承认 AI 的存在性风险。各大 AI 公司承诺与政府共享安全信息。国际 AI 治理的里程碑。
英国在布莱切利庄园——现代计算的诞生地——举办首届全球 AI 安全峰会。28 个国家的代表（包括美国、中国和欧盟）签署《布莱切利宣言》，承认 AI 的存在性风险。各大 AI 公司承诺与政府共享安全信息。国际 AI 治理的里程碑。
Source: GOV.UK ↗来源: GOV.UK ↗
Oct
Industry行业 Oct 30 ★

Biden Signs Landmark AI Executive Order拜登 签署 Landmark AI 行政令

President Biden signed the most comprehensive US executive order on AI, requiring safety testing for powerful AI systems, establishing AI safety standards through NIST, and addressing risks across national security, privacy, equity, and labor markets.



拜登总统签署美国最全面的 AI 行政令，要求对强大 AI 系统进行安全测试，通过 NIST 制定 AI 安全标准，覆盖国家安全、隐私、公平和劳动力市场等风险。
拜登总统签署美国最全面的 AI 行政令，要求对强大 AI 系统进行安全测试，通过 NIST 制定 AI 安全标准，覆盖国家安全、隐私、公平和劳动力市场等风险。
Source: White House ↗来源: White House ↗

Products产品 Sep 27

Meta Connect 2023: Quest 3 and AI Studio LaunchMeta Connect 2023: Quest 3 and AI Studio 发布

At Meta Connect 2023, Meta unveiled the Meta Quest 3 mixed-reality headset alongside a significant AI push. The event introduced AI Studio, enabling creators and businesses to build custom AI personas within Meta's social platforms. Meta also demonstrated AI-powered characters, real-time AI-generated backgrounds for video calls, and sticker generation in WhatsApp and Messenger. The announcements marked Meta's bet on the intersection of spatial computing and generative AI as the next computing platform.



Meta Connect 2023 上，Meta 发布 Quest 3 混合现实头显，同步推进 AI 战略。活动展示了 AI Studio、AI 角色、实时 AI 视频背景和 WhatsApp/Messenger 的贴纸生成功能。这些动作表明 Meta 押注空间计算与生成式 AI 的交汇点作为下一代计算平台。
Meta Connect 2023 上，Meta 发布 Quest 3 混合现实头显，同步推进 AI 战略。活动展示了 AI Studio、AI 角色、实时 AI 视频背景和 WhatsApp/Messenger 的贴纸生成功能。这些动作表明 Meta 押注空间计算与生成式 AI 的交汇点作为下一代计算平台。

Models模型 Sep 27 ★

Mistral AI Releases Mistral 7B: Outperforms Llama 2 13BMistral AI 发布 Mistral 7B: Outperforms Llama 2 13B

Mistral AI released Mistral 7B on September 27, 2023, a 7-billion parameter open-source model that outperformed Meta's Llama 2 13B on every benchmark despite being half the size. Released via BitTorrent with an Apache 2.0 license with no usage restrictions, it became instantly available to the open-source community. Mistral 7B demonstrated that model efficiency could match brute-force scale, establishing Mistral as a leading open-source AI lab. The release was a watershed moment for small, highly capable language models.



Mistral AI 开源 Mistral 7B，一个 70 亿参数模型，在所有基准上都超过了大一倍的 Llama 2 13B。通过 BitTorrent 以 Apache 2.0 协议无限制分发。Mistral 7B 证明模型效率可以匹敌暴力堆参数，Mistral 由此跻身顶级开源 AI 实验室。小而强的语言模型时代开启。
Mistral AI 开源 Mistral 7B，一个 70 亿参数模型，在所有基准上都超过了大一倍的 Llama 2 13B。通过 BitTorrent 以 Apache 2.0 协议无限制分发。Mistral 7B 证明模型效率可以匹敌暴力堆参数，Mistral 由此跻身顶级开源 AI 实验室。小而强的语言模型时代开启。
Source: Mistral AI ↗来源: Mistral AI ↗
Funding融资 Sep 25 ★

Amazon Invests $4B in Anthropic亚马逊 投资 $4B in Anthropic

Amazon announced a major strategic investment of up to $4 billion in Anthropic on September 25, 2023, with an initial $1.25 billion committed immediately. As part of the deal, Anthropic would use AWS as its primary cloud provider, and Amazon's customers would gain access to Claude models through Amazon Bedrock. Amazon also received a minority stake in Anthropic. The investment was Amazon's largest-ever venture bet and positioned AWS as a leading platform for enterprise AI — directly challenging Microsoft's OpenAI partnership.



Amazon 宣布对 Anthropic 战略投资最高 $4B，首期到账 $1.25B。作为交换，Anthropic 将 AWS 作为主要云服务商，AWS 客户可通过 Amazon Bedrock 使用 Claude 模型。这是 Amazon 有史以来最大的风投押注，直接叫板 Microsoft 和 OpenAI 的合作关系。
Amazon 宣布对 Anthropic 战略投资最高 $4B，首期到账 $1.25B。作为交换，Anthropic 将 AWS 作为主要云服务商，AWS 客户可通过 Amazon Bedrock 使用 Claude 模型。这是 Amazon 有史以来最大的风投押注，直接叫板 Microsoft 和 OpenAI 的合作关系。
Source: About Amazon ↗来源: About Amazon ↗
Aug
Funding融资 Aug 23 ★

Hugging Face Raises $235M Series D at $4.5B ValuationHugging Face 融资 $235M Series D at $4.5B Valuation

Hugging Face raised $235 million in a Series D funding round at a $4.5 billion valuation on August 23, 2023. The round was led by Salesforce Ventures and included investments from Google, Amazon, Nvidia, AMD, Intel, IBM, and Qualcomm — representing unprecedented backing from virtually all major tech companies. The investment validated Hugging Face's position as the central platform for open-source AI, hosting hundreds of thousands of models and datasets. The funding was earmarked for expanding the Hub, enterprise features, and compute infrastructure.



Hugging Face 完成 $235M D 轮融资，估值 $4.5B。Salesforce Ventures 领投，Google、Amazon、Nvidia、AMD、Intel、IBM、Qualcomm 齐参与——几乎所有科技巨头都投了。这验证了 Hugging Face 作为开源 AI 中心平台的地位，资金用于扩展 Hub、企业功能和算力基础设施。
Hugging Face 完成 $235M D 轮融资，估值 $4.5B。Salesforce Ventures 领投，Google、Amazon、Nvidia、AMD、Intel、IBM、Qualcomm 齐参与——几乎所有科技巨头都投了。这验证了 Hugging Face 作为开源 AI 中心平台的地位，资金用于扩展 Hub、企业功能和算力基础设施。
Source: Hugging Face Blog ↗来源: Hugging Face Blog ↗
Industry行业 Aug 15 ★

China's Generative AI Regulations Take Effect中国生成式 AI 管理规定正式生效

China's Cyberspace Administration enacted the "Interim Measures for the Management of Generative Artificial Intelligence Services," becoming one of the world's first comprehensive generative AI regulatory frameworks. The rules require AI services to align with "socialist core values," register with authorities, and label AI-generated content. A milestone in global AI governance.



中国网信办施行《生成式人工智能服务管理暂行办法》，成为全球首批综合性生成式 AI 监管框架之一。要求 AI 服务符合社会主义核心价值观、向主管部门备案、标注 AI 生成内容。全球 AI 治理的里程碑事件。
中国网信办施行《生成式人工智能服务管理暂行办法》，成为全球首批综合性生成式 AI 监管框架之一。要求 AI 服务符合社会主义核心价值观、向主管部门备案、标注 AI 生成内容。全球 AI 治理的里程碑事件。
Source: CAC ↗来源: CAC ↗
Jul
Models模型 Jul 18 ★

Meta Releases Llama 2 for Commercial UseMeta 发布 Llama 2 （商用版）

Meta released Llama 2 on July 18, 2023, in partnership with Microsoft, making it freely available for research and commercial use. Llama 2 models (7B, 13B, 34B, 70B) were significantly better than Llama 1 and included instruction-tuned chat variants. The commercial license covered most businesses with under 700M monthly users, making it the most permissive frontier open model to date. Llama 2 became the dominant open-source base model for enterprise fine-tuning and local deployment, validating Meta's open strategy.



Meta 联合 Microsoft 开源 Llama 2（7B/13B/34B/70B），研究和商业免费使用。包含指令微调的聊天版本，商业许可覆盖月活 7 亿以下的企业。Llama 2 成为企业微调和本地部署的主流开源基座模型，验证了 Meta 的开放策略。
Meta 联合 Microsoft 开源 Llama 2（7B/13B/34B/70B），研究和商业免费使用。包含指令微调的聊天版本，商业许可覆盖月活 7 亿以下的企业。Llama 2 成为企业微调和本地部署的主流开源基座模型，验证了 Meta 的开放策略。
Source: Meta AI Blog ↗来源: Meta AI Blog ↗
Products产品 Jul 12

Google Launches NotebookLMGoogle 发布 NotebookLM

Google launched NotebookLM on July 12, 2023, initially to a limited group of US users. Originally previewed at Google I/O 2023 as "Project Tailwind," NotebookLM is an AI-powered research and note-taking tool that grounds its responses in user-provided documents, reducing hallucination. The product became broadly available in December 2023, gained AI-generated audio podcast summaries ("Audio Overviews") in 2024, and quickly became one of Google's most praised AI consumer products. It represented a new paradigm for AI-assisted reading and research.



Google 上线 NotebookLM，一款 AI 驱动的研究和笔记工具，回答基于用户提供的文档，有效减少幻觉。2024 年加入 AI 生成的播客音频摘要后迅速走红，成为 Google 最受好评的 AI 消费产品之一。它开创了 AI 辅助阅读和研究的新范式。
Google 上线 NotebookLM，一款 AI 驱动的研究和笔记工具，回答基于用户提供的文档，有效减少幻觉。2024 年加入 AI 生成的播客音频摘要后迅速走红，成为 Google 最受好评的 AI 消费产品之一。它开创了 AI 辅助阅读和研究的新范式。
Source: Google Blog ↗来源: Google Blog ↗
Models模型 Jul 11 ★

Anthropic Releases Claude 2Anthropic 发布 Claude 2

Anthropic launched Claude 2, a major upgrade featuring improved reasoning, longer context (100K tokens), and better coding capabilities. Claude 2 scored higher than its predecessor on academic benchmarks including bar exam, GRE, and coding tests. It was made available to the public via claude.ai and API, competing directly with GPT-4. The model also showed improvements in following complex multi-step instructions.



Anthropic 上线 Claude 2，推理能力升级、上下文拉到 100K token、编程能力增强。Claude 2 在律师考试、GRE 和编程测试中全面超越前代。通过 claude.ai 和 API 向公众开放，正面对标 GPT-4。多步骤复杂指令的执行也明显变好。
Anthropic 上线 Claude 2，推理能力升级、上下文拉到 100K token、编程能力增强。Claude 2 在律师考试、GRE 和编程测试中全面超越前代。通过 claude.ai 和 API 向公众开放，正面对标 GPT-4。多步骤复杂指令的执行也明显变好。

May
Industry行业 May 16 ★

Sam Altman Testifies Before US Senate on AI RegulationSam Altman 在美国参议院就 AI 监管作证

OpenAI CEO Sam Altman testified before the US Senate Judiciary Subcommittee on Privacy, Technology, and the Law, calling for government regulation of AI. He suggested the creation of a new federal agency to license AI companies. The hearing marked AI's arrival as a mainstream political issue and set the stage for global regulatory debates.



OpenAI CEO Sam Altman 在美国参议院听证会作证，呼吁政府监管 AI，建议设立新的联邦机构来给 AI 公司发牌照。这场听证标志着 AI 正式成为主流政治议题，为全球监管讨论拉开序幕。
OpenAI CEO Sam Altman 在美国参议院听证会作证，呼吁政府监管 AI，建议设立新的联邦机构来给 AI 公司发牌照。这场听证标志着 AI 正式成为主流政治议题，为全球监管讨论拉开序幕。
Source: US Senate ↗来源: US Senate ↗
Robotics机器人 May 16

Sanctuary AI Unveils Phoenix Gen 6 — General Purpose Humanoid RobotSanctuary AI 发布 Phoenix Gen 6 — General Purpose 人形机器人

Canadian robotics company Sanctuary AI unveiled Phoenix, its sixth-generation general-purpose humanoid robot, alongside Carbon — an AI control system designed to give Phoenix human-like intelligence. Standing 5'7" and weighing 155 lbs, Phoenix could perform over 100 industrial tasks. Sanctuary's vision: robots that can learn any job a human can do, marking an early milestone in the race for commercially viable humanoid robots.



加拿大机器人公司 Sanctuary AI 亮相第六代通用人形机器人 Phoenix，搭配 Carbon AI 控制系统。身高 5'7"、体重 155 磅的 Phoenix 能执行超过 100 种工业任务。Sanctuary 的愿景：造出能学会任何人类工作的机器人，在商用人形机器人竞赛中立下早期里程碑。
加拿大机器人公司 Sanctuary AI 亮相第六代通用人形机器人 Phoenix，搭配 Carbon AI 控制系统。身高 5'7"、体重 155 磅的 Phoenix 能执行超过 100 种工业任务。Sanctuary 的愿景：造出能学会任何人类工作的机器人，在商用人形机器人竞赛中立下早期里程碑。
Source: Sanctuary AI ↗来源: Sanctuary AI ↗
Models模型 May 11 ★

Claude Achieves 100K Token Context WindowClaude 实现 10 万 Token 上下文窗口

Anthropic announced that Claude now supports a 100,000-token context window — equivalent to roughly 75,000 words or an entire book. This was a breakthrough in long-context AI, enabling users to analyze large codebases, lengthy documents, and complex research papers in a single prompt. The 100K context window set a new industry benchmark and significantly expanded Claude's practical use cases.



Anthropic 宣布 Claude 支持 100,000 token 上下文窗口——约 75,000 词，差不多一本书。这是长上下文 AI 的突破，用户可以一次分析大型代码库、长篇文档和复杂研究论文。100K 上下文窗口刷新了行业标杆，大幅拓展了 Claude 的实用场景。
Anthropic 宣布 Claude 支持 100,000 token 上下文窗口——约 75,000 词，差不多一本书。这是长上下文 AI 的突破，用户可以一次分析大型代码库、长篇文档和复杂研究论文。100K 上下文窗口刷新了行业标杆，大幅拓展了 Claude 的实用场景。
Source: Anthropic ↗来源: Anthropic ↗
Models模型 May 10 ★

Google Announces PaLM 2 at Google I/O 2023Google 宣布 PaLM 2 at Google I/O 2023

Google unveiled PaLM 2 at Google I/O on May 10, 2023, its next-generation large language model with significantly improved multilingual, reasoning, and coding capabilities. PaLM 2 powered over 25 Google products at launch, including Bard, Workspace AI features, and the new Med-PaLM 2 medical variant. It was available in four sizes (Gecko, Otter, Bison, Unicorn) allowing deployment across devices from mobile to enterprise scale. PaLM 2 represented Google's answer to GPT-4, demonstrating that training efficiency improvements could yield major capability gains without simply scaling parameters.



Google 在 I/O 大会亮相 PaLM 2，多语言、推理和编程能力大幅提升。PaLM 2 上线即驱动 25+ 款 Google 产品，包括 Bard 和医疗版 Med-PaLM 2。四个尺寸（Gecko、Otter、Bison、Unicorn）覆盖从手机到企业级部署。PaLM 2 是 Google 对 GPT-4 的回应——训练效率提升带来的能力飞跃，不只靠堆参数。
Google 在 I/O 大会亮相 PaLM 2，多语言、推理和编程能力大幅提升。PaLM 2 上线即驱动 25+ 款 Google 产品，包括 Bard 和医疗版 Med-PaLM 2。四个尺寸（Gecko、Otter、Bison、Unicorn）覆盖从手机到企业级部署。PaLM 2 是 Google 对 GPT-4 的回应——训练效率提升带来的能力飞跃，不只靠堆参数。
Source: Google Blog ↗来源: Google Blog ↗
Industry行业 May 1 ★

Geoffrey Hinton Leaves Google, Warns of AI Existential RiskGeoffrey Hinton 离开 Google，警告 AI 存在性风险

Geoffrey Hinton, the "Godfather of AI" and 2024 Nobel laureate, resigned from Google to speak freely about the dangers of AI. He warned that AI systems could become more intelligent than humans sooner than expected, marking a watershed moment in the AI safety debate.



「AI 教父」Geoffrey Hinton（2024 年诺贝尔奖得主）从 Google 辞职，为的是能自由谈论 AI 的危险。他警告 AI 系统可能比预期更早超越人类智能，这成为 AI 安全讨论的分水岭时刻。
「AI 教父」Geoffrey Hinton（2024 年诺贝尔奖得主）从 Google 辞职，为的是能自由谈论 AI 的危险。他警告 AI 系统可能比预期更早超越人类智能，这成为 AI 安全讨论的分水岭时刻。
Source: NYT ↗来源: NYT ↗
Apr
Industry行业 Apr 14 ★

Google DeepMind Formed by Merger of DeepMind and Google BrainGoogle DeepMind 成立：DeepMind 与 Google Brain 合并

Google announced the merger of DeepMind and Google Brain into a single unit called Google DeepMind on April 14, 2023. The move consolidated Google's two most prominent AI research organizations under a unified leadership structure, with Demis Hassabis serving as CEO. The merger was designed to accelerate AI progress by combining DeepMind's foundational research strengths with Google Brain's deep expertise in large-scale machine learning. Google DeepMind became one of the most powerful AI research organizations in the world.



Google 宣布将 DeepMind 和 Google Brain 合并为 Google DeepMind，由 Demis Hassabis 担任 CEO。此举把 Google 两大顶级 AI 研究机构整合到统一架构下，结合 DeepMind 的基础研究实力和 Google Brain 的大规模机器学习经验。Google DeepMind 由此成为全球最强大的 AI 研究组织之一。
Google 宣布将 DeepMind 和 Google Brain 合并为 Google DeepMind，由 Demis Hassabis 担任 CEO。此举把 Google 两大顶级 AI 研究机构整合到统一架构下，结合 DeepMind 的基础研究实力和 Google Brain 的大规模机器学习经验。Google DeepMind 由此成为全球最强大的 AI 研究组织之一。
Source: Google DeepMind ↗来源: Google DeepMind ↗
Mar
Products产品 Mar 14 ★

Anthropic Launches ClaudeAnthropic 发布 Claude

Anthropic publicly launched Claude, its first AI assistant, on March 14, 2023. Claude was designed with safety as a core principle, trained using Constitutional AI (CAI) to be helpful, harmless, and honest. The launch marked Anthropic's entrance into the consumer AI market, positioning itself as a safety-focused alternative to ChatGPT. Early access was available via claude.ai and API.



Anthropic 公开上线 Claude，首款 AI 助手。Claude 把安全放在核心位置，用 Constitutional AI (CAI) 训练，追求有用、无害、诚实。这标志着 Anthropic 正式进入消费级 AI 市场，定位为 ChatGPT 的安全替代方案。
Anthropic 公开上线 Claude，首款 AI 助手。Claude 把安全放在核心位置，用 Constitutional AI (CAI) 训练，追求有用、无害、诚实。这标志着 Anthropic 正式进入消费级 AI 市场，定位为 ChatGPT 的安全替代方案。
Source: Anthropic ↗来源: Anthropic ↗
Models模型 Mar 14 ★

OpenAI Releases GPT-4OpenAI 发布 GPT-4

OpenAI released GPT-4, its most capable large language model at the time, featuring multimodal inputs (text and images) and dramatically improved reasoning. GPT-4 scored in the top 10% of bar exam takers and significantly outperformed GPT-3.5 on standard benchmarks. The model powered ChatGPT Plus and was made available via API. GPT-4 set a new standard for frontier AI and accelerated enterprise adoption of large language models across industries.



OpenAI 发布 GPT-4，当时最强大语言模型，支持多模态输入（文本+图片），推理能力大幅跃升。GPT-4 在律师考试中排进前 10%，各项基准远超 GPT-3.5。模型驱动 ChatGPT Plus 并开放 API。GPT-4 为前沿 AI 定下新标杆，加速了各行业采用大语言模型。
OpenAI 发布 GPT-4，当时最强大语言模型，支持多模态输入（文本+图片），推理能力大幅跃升。GPT-4 在律师考试中排进前 10%，各项基准远超 GPT-3.5。模型驱动 ChatGPT Plus 并开放 API。GPT-4 为前沿 AI 定下新标杆，加速了各行业采用大语言模型。
Source: OpenAI ↗来源: OpenAI ↗
Feb
Models模型 Feb 24 ★

Meta Releases LLaMA 1: Open-Source Large Language ModelsMeta 发布 LLaMA 1: 开源 Large Language Models

Meta released LLaMA (Large Language Model Meta AI) on February 24, 2023, a collection of foundation language models ranging from 7B to 65B parameters. Unlike proprietary models, LLaMA was released for research purposes to democratize access to large language models. Despite a research-only license, LLaMA weights leaked online within days, sparking an explosion of open-source AI development. LLaMA kickstarted the open-source LLM movement, enabling Alpaca, Vicuna, and dozens of community fine-tunes that accelerated AI research globally.



Meta 开源 LLaMA，一系列从 7B 到 65B 参数的基础语言模型。跟闭源模型不同，LLaMA 面向研究社区开放。尽管只授权研究用途，权重几天内就泄露到网上，点燃了开源 AI 大爆发。LLaMA 催生了 Alpaca、Vicuna 和数十个社区微调版本，推动全球 AI 研究提速。
Meta 开源 LLaMA，一系列从 7B 到 65B 参数的基础语言模型。跟闭源模型不同，LLaMA 面向研究社区开放。尽管只授权研究用途，权重几天内就泄露到网上，点燃了开源 AI 大爆发。LLaMA 催生了 Alpaca、Vicuna 和数十个社区微调版本，推动全球 AI 研究提速。
Source: Meta AI Blog ↗来源: Meta AI Blog ↗
Products产品 Feb 7 ★

Microsoft Launches AI-Powered Bing with ChatGPT微软 发布 AI-Powered Bing with ChatGPT

Microsoft launched the new AI-powered Bing on February 7, 2023, integrating OpenAI's GPT-4 model into its search engine. The new Bing featured a conversational chat interface alongside traditional search results, allowing users to ask complex questions and get synthesized answers. Microsoft positioned Bing Chat as a "co-pilot for the web," marking the most significant challenge to Google's search dominance in decades. The launch ignited an AI search war and was later renamed Microsoft Copilot.



Microsoft 上线 AI 版 Bing，把 OpenAI 的 GPT-4 集成进搜索引擎。新 Bing 在传统搜索结果旁加了对话式聊天界面，用户可以提复杂问题并获得综合回答。Microsoft 把它定位为「网络副驾驶」，这是几十年来 Google 搜索霸主地位面临的最大挑战。后来改名为 Microsoft Copilot。
Microsoft 上线 AI 版 Bing，把 OpenAI 的 GPT-4 集成进搜索引擎。新 Bing 在传统搜索结果旁加了对话式聊天界面，用户可以提复杂问题并获得综合回答。Microsoft 把它定位为「网络副驾驶」，这是几十年来 Google 搜索霸主地位面临的最大挑战。后来改名为 Microsoft Copilot。
Source: Microsoft Blog ↗来源: Microsoft Blog ↗
Products产品 Feb 6 ★

Google Announces Bard AI ChatbotGoogle 宣布 Bard AI Chatbot

Google announced Bard, its experimental conversational AI service powered by LaMDA (Language Model for Dialogue Applications), on February 6, 2023 — just days after Microsoft launched the new AI-powered Bing. Bard was initially made available to trusted testers before opening to the public in March. The announcement signaled Google's urgency to compete in the AI chatbot space, though an early demo error briefly knocked $100B off Alphabet's market cap, highlighting the risks of rushed AI deployment.



Google 在 Microsoft 推出 AI 版 Bing 几天后，紧急宣布实验性对话 AI 服务 Bard，底层跑的是 LaMDA。Bard 先给内测用户试用，三月向公众开放。但一次早期演示出了错，Alphabet 市值一天蒸发 $100B——AI 仓促上阵的代价。
Google 在 Microsoft 推出 AI 版 Bing 几天后，紧急宣布实验性对话 AI 服务 Bard，底层跑的是 LaMDA。Bard 先给内测用户试用，三月向公众开放。但一次早期演示出了错，Alphabet 市值一天蒸发 $100B——AI 仓促上阵的代价。
Source: Google Blog ↗来源: Google Blog ↗
Jan
Funding融资 Jan 23 ★

Microsoft Invests $10B in OpenAI微软向 OpenAI 投资 100 亿美元

Microsoft announced a multiyear, multi-billion-dollar investment in OpenAI on January 23, 2023 — reported to total $10 billion over multiple years. The deal extended and deepened the partnership that began in 2019, giving Microsoft exclusive rights to commercialize OpenAI's technologies through Azure. Microsoft planned to integrate OpenAI models across its product suite including Office 365, Bing, and GitHub Copilot. The investment transformed Microsoft's competitive position versus Google and was the defining AI partnership deal of the era.



Microsoft 宣布对 OpenAI 追加多年期数十亿美元投资，据报总额达 $10B。这笔交易延续了 2019 年开始的合作关系，Microsoft 拿到 OpenAI 技术在 Azure 上的独家商业化权。Microsoft 计划把 OpenAI 模型整合进 Office 365、Bing 和 GitHub Copilot。这笔投资彻底改变了 Microsoft 与 Google 的竞争格局，堪称这个时代最具定义性的 AI 合作案。
Microsoft 宣布对 OpenAI 追加多年期数十亿美元投资，据报总额达 $10B。这笔交易延续了 2019 年开始的合作关系，Microsoft 拿到 OpenAI 技术在 Azure 上的独家商业化权。Microsoft 计划把 OpenAI 模型整合进 Office 365、Bing 和 GitHub Copilot。这笔投资彻底改变了 Microsoft 与 Google 的竞争格局，堪称这个时代最具定义性的 AI 合作案。
Source: Microsoft Blog ↗来源: Microsoft Blog ↗
2022
Nov
Products产品 Nov 30 ★

OpenAI Launches ChatGPTOpenAI 发布 ChatGPT

OpenAI launched ChatGPT on November 30, 2022, as a free research preview built on GPT-3.5. Within five days it attracted one million users, and within two months reached 100 million — the fastest consumer app growth in history. ChatGPT demonstrated that conversational AI could be genuinely useful for writing, coding, analysis, and Q&A at scale. The release triggered a wave of AI investment and competition that reshaped the entire technology industry.



OpenAI 在 2022 年 11 月 30 日上线 ChatGPT，基于 GPT-3.5 的免费研究预览。五天内吸引一百万用户，两个月破亿——史上增长最快的消费级应用。ChatGPT 证明对话式 AI 在写作、编程、分析和问答上真的好用。这次发布引爆了一轮 AI 投资和竞争浪潮，重塑了整个科技行业。
OpenAI 在 2022 年 11 月 30 日上线 ChatGPT，基于 GPT-3.5 的免费研究预览。五天内吸引一百万用户，两个月破亿——史上增长最快的消费级应用。ChatGPT 证明对话式 AI 在写作、编程、分析和问答上真的好用。这次发布引爆了一轮 AI 投资和竞争浪潮，重塑了整个科技行业。
Source: OpenAI ↗来源: OpenAI ↗
